content.text: The task tracking reminder isn't applicable to this analysis work. Let me continue reading the key files. The frontend-gdriverights repo uses a thin facade pattern with extensive lifecycle wrappers. Now let me sample core.yml from this repo and look at the python repos and tools repos.

content.content:
1	# taskfiles/core.yml — nextjs_frontend-gdriverights
2	# Generieke infra-laag: setup, lifecycle, logs, clean, docker
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  # ── Project identity ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8	  APP_NAME: nextjs_frontend-gdriverights
9	
10	  # ── Tooling ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11	  PKG_MANAGER: pnpm
12	  INSTALL_CMD: pnpm install
13	  DEV_HOST: 0.0.0.0
14	  PROD_HOST: 0.0.0.0
15	  DEV_CMD: 'pnpm exec next dev --turbopack --hostname {{.DEV_HOST}} --port {{.DEV_PORT}}'
16	  PROD_CMD: 'pnpm exec next start --hostname {{.PROD_HOST}} --port {{.PROD_PORT}}'
17	  DEV_CERT_FILE: certificates/localhost.pem
18	  DEV_KEY_FILE: certificates/localhost-key.pem
19	
20	  # ── Runtime paden ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
21	  RUNTIME_DIR: .taskrun
22	  LOGS_DIR: .taskrun/logs
23	  DEV_LOG: .taskrun/logs/dev.log
24	  PROD_LOG: .taskrun/logs/prod.log
25	
26	  # ── Ports (uit port.config.json) ──────────────────────────────────────────
27	  DEV_PORT: '44007'
28	  PROD_PORT: '44008'
29	  DOCKER_PORT: '3000'
30	  DEV_SCHEME: https
31	  PROD_SCHEME: http
32	  DOCKER_SCHEME: http
33	
34	  # ── Docker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
35	  DOCKER_SERVICE: app
36	
37	  # ── Timeouts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
38	  START_TIMEOUT: '30'
39	  STOP_TIMEOUT: '15'
40	
41	tasks:
42	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
43	  # HELP
44	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
45	  help:
46	    desc: Toon overzicht van beschikbare commando's
47	    silent: false
48	    cmds:
49	      - |
50	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
51	        printf "\033[1mdev port:\033[0m  %s\n" "{{.DEV_PORT}}"
52	        printf "\033[1mprod port:\033[0m %s\n" "{{.PROD_PORT}}"
53	        printf "\n\033[1;33mLifecycle:\033[0m\n"
54	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m        bootstrap dependencies + health-check\n"
55	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup-quick\033[0m  snelle setup (alleen install)\n"
56	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev-setup\033[0m    volledige developer setup\n"
57	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m        start development server\n"
58	        printf "  \033[32mtask start-frontend\033[0m start frontend alias\n"
59	        printf "  \033[32mtask start-prod\033[0m   start productie server\n"
60	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m         stop alle services\n"
61	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop-frontend\033[0m stop frontend alias\n"
62	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m      herstart development server\n"
63	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart-frontend\033[0m herstart frontend alias\n"
64	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m       service status + endpoints\n"
65	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m         volg development logs\n"
66	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs-frontend\033[0m volg frontend logs alias\n"
67	        printf "\n\033[1;33mProject:\033[0m\n"
68	        printf "  \033[32mtask build\033[0m          build voor productie\n"
69	        printf "  \033[32mtask test\033[0m           run tests (jest)\n"
70	        printf "  \033[32mtask test:watch\033[0m     tests in watch mode\n"
71	        printf "  \033[32mtask test:coverage\033[0m  tests met coverage\n"
72	        printf "  \033[32mtask test:e2e\033[0m       end-to-end tests (Playwright)\n"
73	        printf "  \033[32mtask lint\033[0m           lint code\n"
74	        printf "  \033[32mtask lint:fix\033[0m       auto-fix lint issues\n"
75	        printf "  \033[32mtask format\033[0m         format code (prettier)\n"
76	        printf "  \033[32mtask format:check\033[0m   check formatting\n"
77	        printf "  \033[32mtask type-check\033[0m     TypeScript type-check\n"
78	        printf "  \033[32mtask check\033[0m          lint + type-check + format-check\n"
79	        printf "\n\033[1;33mMaintenance:\033[0m\n"
80	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean\033[0m        verwijder build-artefacten\n"
81	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:cache\033[0m  verwijder caches\n"
82	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:all\033[0m    verwijder alles (node_modules + artefacten)\n"
83	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean:logs\033[0m   verwijder logbestanden\n"
84	        printf "  \033[32mtask uninstall\033[0m    verwijder node_modules en caches\n"
85	        printf "  \033[32mtask backup-config\033[0m backup configuratiebestanden\n"
86	        printf "\n\033[1;33mDocker:\033[0m\n"
87	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:build\033[0m   build Docker image\n"
88	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:up\033[0m      start containers\n"
89	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:down\033[0m    stop containers\n"
90	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:logs\033[0m    volg Docker logs\n"
91	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:rebuild\033[0m rebuild + herstart\n"
92	        printf "  \033[32mtask docker:shell\033[0m   shell in container\n"
93	        printf "\n"
94	
95	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
96	  # SETUP
97	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
98	  setup:
99	    desc: Install dependencies + env bootstrap + health-check
100	    silent: false
101	    cmds:
102	      - task: _ensure-dirs
103	      - task: install
104	      - task: _bootstrap-env
105	      - task: doctor
106	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Setup voltooid\n"
107	
108	  setup-quick:
109	    desc: Snelle setup (install + env bootstrap indien mogelijk)
110	    cmds:
111	      - task: install
112	      - task: _bootstrap-env
113	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Quick setup voltooid\n"
114	
115	  dev-setup:
116	    desc: Volledige developer setup (install + env bootstrap + doctor + build)
117	    silent: false
118	    cmds:
119	      - task: _ensure-dirs
120	      - task: install
121	      - task: _bootstrap-env
122	      - task: doctor
123	      - task: _build-check
124	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Developer setup voltooid\n"
125	
126	  install:
127	    desc: Install dependencies
128	    cmds:
129	      - '{{.INSTALL_CMD}}'
130	
131	  uninstall:
132	    desc: Verwijder node_modules en caches
133	    cmds:
134	      - |
135	        rm -rf node_modules .next .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
136	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m node_modules en caches verwijderd\n"
137	
138	  doctor:
139	    desc: Health-check (vereiste tools aanwezig?)
140	    silent: false
141	    cmds:
142	      - |
143	        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
144	        MISSING=""
145	        WARN=""
146	        _has task   || MISSING="$MISSING task"
147	        _has node   || MISSING="$MISSING node"
148	        _has pnpm   || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"
149	        _has docker || WARN="$WARN docker"
150	        # fnm: check PATH en bekende installatiepaden
151	        if _has fnm; then
152	          FNM_V=$(fnm --version 2>/dev/null)
153	        elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/fnm/fnm" ]; then
154	          FNM_V=$("$HOME/.local/share/fnm/fnm" --version 2>/dev/null)
155	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m fnm gevonden in ~/.local/share/fnm/ maar niet in PATH\n"
156	        else
157	          WARN="$WARN fnm"
158	        fi
159	        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
160	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
161	          exit 1
162	        fi
163	        [ -n "$WARN" ] && printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Optionele tools niet gevonden:%s\n" "$WARN"
164	        NODE_V=$(node -v 2>/dev/null)
165	        PNPM_V=$(pnpm -v 2>/dev/null)
166	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Vereiste tools aanwezig (node %s, pnpm %s" "$NODE_V" "$PNPM_V"
167	        [ -n "$FNM_V" ] && printf ", %s" "$FNM_V"
168	        printf ")\n"
169	
170	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
171	  # LIFECYCLE
172	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
173	  start:
174	    desc: Start development server
175	    silent: false
176	    cmds:
177	      - task: _ensure-ready
178	      - task: _ensure-dirs
179	      - task: _kill-mode
180	        vars:
181	          TARGET_PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
182	          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid'
183	      - |
184	        DEV_CMD='{{.DEV_CMD}}'
185	        if [ -f "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" ] && [ -f "{{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}" ]; then
186	          DEV_CMD="$DEV_CMD --experimental-https --experimental-https-cert {{.DEV_CERT_FILE}} --experimental-https-key {{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}"
187	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Gebruik bestaand HTTPS certificaat uit {{.DEV_CERT_FILE}} en {{.DEV_KEY_FILE}}\n"
188	        else
189	          DEV_CMD="$DEV_CMD --experimental-https"
190	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen lokaal HTTPS certificaat gevonden; eerste run kan een sudo-prompt geven voor certificaatgeneratie\n"
191	        fi
192	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Starting {{.APP_NAME}} op poort {{.DEV_PORT}}...\n"
193	        : > "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
194	        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
195	          nohup setsid bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
196	        else
197	          nohup bash -lc "$DEV_CMD" >> "{{.DEV_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
198	        fi
199	      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
200	        vars:
201	          LABEL: development
202	          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
203	          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
204	          HOST: 127.0.0.1
205	          LOG_FILE: '{{.DEV_LOG}}'
206	      - |
207	        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.DEV_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
208	        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
209	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Development server reageert, maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.DEV_PORT}}\n"
210	          exit 1
211	        fi
212	        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/dev.pid"
213	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Development server draait op {{.DEV_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.DEV_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
214	      - task: _show-endpoints
215	        vars:
216	          LABEL: development
217	          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
218	          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
219	
220	  start-prod:
221	    desc: Start productie server (vereist build)
222	    silent: false
223	    cmds:
224	      - task: _ensure-ready
225	      - task: _ensure-dirs
226	      - task: _kill-mode
227	        vars:
228	          TARGET_PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
229	          PID_FILE: '{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid'
230	      - |
231	        if [ ! -d ".next" ]; then
232	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen build gevonden, eerst builden...\n"
233	          pnpm run build
234	        fi
235	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Starting {{.APP_NAME}} (prod) op poort {{.PROD_PORT}}...\n"
236	        : > "{{.PROD_LOG}}"
237	        if command -v setsid >/dev/null 2>&1; then
238	          nohup setsid bash -lc "{{.PROD_CMD}}" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
239	        else
240	          nohup bash -lc "{{.PROD_CMD}}" >> "{{.PROD_LOG}}" 2>&1 < /dev/null &
241	        fi
242	      - task: _wait-for-endpoint
243	        vars:
244	          LABEL: production
245	          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
246	          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
247	          HOST: 127.0.0.1
248	          LOG_FILE: '{{.PROD_LOG}}'
249	      - |
250	        REAL_PID=$(fuser "{{.PROD_PORT}}"/tcp 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
251	        if [ -z "$REAL_PID" ]; then
252	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Productie server reageert, maar PID kon niet bepaald worden op poort {{.PROD_PORT}}\n"
253	          exit 1
254	        fi
255	        echo "$REAL_PID" > "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/prod.pid"
256	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Productie server draait op {{.PROD_SCHEME}}://localhost:{{.PROD_PORT}} (PID %s)\n" "$REAL_PID"
257	      - task: _show-endpoints
258	        vars:
259	          LABEL: production
260	          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
261	          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
262	
263	  stop:
264	    desc: Stop alle services
265	    silent: false
266	    cmds:
267	      - |
268	        STOPPED=0
269	        for NAME in dev prod; do
270	          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.DEV_PORT}}"; else PORT="{{.PROD_PORT}}"; fi
271	          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
272	          # Stop via PID-bestand
273	          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
274	            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null)
275	            if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
276	              /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
277	              WAITED=0
278	              while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$WAITED" -lt "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
279	                sleep 1; WAITED=$((WAITED + 1))
280	              done
281	              /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
282	              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt (PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PID"
283	              STOPPED=1
284	            fi
285	            rm -f "$PIDFILE"
286	          fi
287	          # Laatste fallback: kill alles op de poort (pnpm kan orphan-processen achterlaten)
288	          if fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
289	            fuser -k "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
290	            sleep 1
291	            fuser "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$PORT"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
292	            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m %s gestopt via poort %s (orphan cleanup)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
293	            STOPPED=1
294	          fi
295	        done
296	        if [ "$STOPPED" = "0" ]; then
297	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen draaiende services gevonden\n"
298	        fi
299	
300	  restart:
301	    desc: Herstart development server
302	    silent: false
303	    cmds:
304	      - task: stop
305	      - |
306	        sleep 1
307	      - task: start
308	
309	  status:
310	    desc: Service status
311	    silent: false
312	    cmds:
313	      - |
314	        _port_online() {
315	          local P="$1"
316	          local S="$2"
317	          local CURL_EXTRA=""
318	          if [ "$S" = "https" ]; then
319	            CURL_EXTRA="-k"
320	          fi
321	          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
322	            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${S}://127.0.0.1:${P}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
323	            if [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
324	              return 0
325	            fi
326	          fi
327	          if command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
328	            if fuser "$P"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
329	              return 0
330	            fi
331	          fi
332	          return 1
333	        }
334	        printf "\033[1;36m=== Service status ===\033[0m\n"
335	        for NAME in dev prod; do
336	          if [ "$NAME" = "dev" ]; then PORT="{{.DEV_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.DEV_SCHEME}}"; else PORT="{{.PROD_PORT}}"; SCHEME="{{.PROD_SCHEME}}"; fi
337	          PIDFILE="{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}/${NAME}.pid"
338	          PID=""
339	          if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
340	            PID=$(head -1 "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true)
341	          fi
342	          PID_RUNNING=0
343	          if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
344	            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && PID_RUNNING=1
345	          fi
346	          if _port_online "$PORT" "$SCHEME"; then
347	            if [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
348	              printf "\033[32m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, PID %s)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT" "$PID"
349	            else
350	              printf "\033[33m[RUNNING]\033[0m  %s  (poort %s, niet via task gestart)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
351	            fi
352	          elif [ "$PID_RUNNING" = "1" ]; then
353	            printf "\033[33m[STARTING]\033[0m %s  (proces actief, poort %s nog niet online)\n" "$NAME" "$PORT"
354	          else
355	            if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
356	              rm -f "$PIDFILE" 2>/dev/null || true
357	            fi
358	            printf "\033[31m[STOPPED]\033[0m  %s\n" "$NAME"
359	          fi
360	        done
361	      - task: _show-endpoints
362	        vars:
363	          LABEL: development
364	          PORT: '{{.DEV_PORT}}'
365	          SCHEME: '{{.DEV_SCHEME}}'
366	      - task: _show-endpoints
367	        vars:
368	          LABEL: production
369	          PORT: '{{.PROD_PORT}}'
370	          SCHEME: '{{.PROD_SCHEME}}'
371	
372	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
373	  # LOGS
374	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
375	  logs:
376	    desc: Volg development logs
377	    cmds:
378	      - |
379	        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen logbestand gevonden ({{.DEV_LOG}})\n"; exit 0; }
380	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Volgen van {{.DEV_LOG}} (Ctrl+C om te stoppen)\n"
381	        tail -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
382	
383	  logs-tail:
384	    desc: Laatste 50 regels + follow
385	    cmds:
386	      - |
387	        test -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}" || { printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen logbestand gevonden\n"; exit 0; }
388	        tail -n 50 -f "{{.DEV_LOG}}"
389	
390	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
391	  # MAINTENANCE
392	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
393	  clean:
394	    desc: Verwijder build-artefacten
395	    cmds:
396	      - |
397	        rm -rf .next dist build out coverage 2>/dev/null || true
398	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build-artefacten opgeruimd\n"
399	
400	  clean-cache:
401	    desc: Verwijder caches (.next, .turbo)
402	    cmds:
403	      - |
404	        rm -rf .next .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
405	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Caches opgeruimd\n"
406	
407	  clean-all:
408	    desc: Verwijder alles (node_modules + build-artefacten + caches)
409	    cmds:
410	      - |
411	        rm -rf node_modules .next dist build out coverage .turbo 2>/dev/null || true
412	        rm -rf "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
413	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Alles opgeruimd\n"
414	
415	  clean-logs:
416	    desc: Verwijder logbestanden
417	    cmds:
418	      - |
419	        rm -rf "{{.LOGS_DIR}}" 2>/dev/null || true
420	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Logs opgeruimd\n"
421	
422	  backup-config:
423	    desc: Backup configuratiebestanden
424	    cmds:
425	      - |
426	        BACKUP_DIR=".task/backups/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
427	        mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
428	        for f in package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc port.config.json docker-compose.yml; do
429	          [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
430	        done
431	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Backup opgeslagen in %s\n" "$BACKUP_DIR"
432	
433	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
434	  # DOCKER
435	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
436	  docker-build:
437	    desc: Build Docker image
438	    silent: false
439	    preconditions:
440	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
441	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
442	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
443	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
444	    cmds:
445	      - docker compose build
446	
447	  docker-up:
448	    desc: Start Docker containers
449	    silent: false
450	    preconditions:
451	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
452	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
453	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
454	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
455	    cmds:
456	      - docker compose up -d
457	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers gestart\n"
458	      - task: _show-endpoints
459	        vars:
460	          LABEL: docker
461	          PORT: '{{.DOCKER_PORT}}'
462	          SCHEME: '{{.DOCKER_SCHEME}}'
463	
464	  docker-down:
465	    desc: Stop Docker containers
466	    silent: false
467	    preconditions:
468	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
469	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
470	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
471	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
472	    cmds:
473	      - docker compose down
474	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers gestopt\n"
475	
476	  docker-logs:
477	    desc: Volg Docker logs
478	    preconditions:
479	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
480	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
481	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
482	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
483	    cmds:
484	      - docker compose logs -f {{.DOCKER_SERVICE}}
485	
486	  docker-rebuild:
487	    desc: Rebuild en herstart Docker containers
488	    silent: false
489	    preconditions:
490	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
491	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
492	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
493	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
494	    cmds:
495	      - docker compose down
496	      - docker compose build --no-cache
497	      - docker compose up -d
498	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker containers herbouwd en gestart\n"
499	      - task: _show-endpoints
500	        vars:
501	          LABEL: docker
502	          PORT: '{{.DOCKER_PORT}}'
503	          SCHEME: '{{.DOCKER_SCHEME}}'
504	
505	  docker-shell:
506	    desc: Open shell in Docker container
507	    preconditions:
508	      - sh: command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1
509	        msg: Docker is niet beschikbaar in PATH
510	      - sh: test -f docker-compose.yml || test -f compose.yml || test -f compose.yaml
511	        msg: Geen Docker Compose bestand gevonden
512	    cmds:
513	      - docker compose exec {{.DOCKER_SERVICE}} sh
514	
515	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
516	  # INTERNAL
517	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
518	  _build-check:
519	    internal: true
520	    silent: false
521	    cmds:
522	      - |
523	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Probeer build...\n"
524	        if pnpm run build; then
525	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build geslaagd\n"
526	        else
527	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Build mislukt — dit blokkeert dev-setup niet, maar check de errors\n"
528	        fi
529	
530	  _bootstrap-env:
531	    internal: true
532	    silent: false
533	    cmds:
534	      - |
535	        if [ -f ".env.local" ] || [ -f ".env" ]; then
536	          exit 0
537	        fi
538	
539	        if [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
540	          cp .env.example .env.local
541	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.example\n"
542	          exit 0
543	        fi
544	
545	        if [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; then
546	          cp .env.local.example .env.local
547	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m .env.local aangemaakt vanuit .env.local.example\n"
548	          exit 0
549	        fi
550	
551	        printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Geen .env/.env.local en geen env-template gevonden; sla env-bootstrap over\n"
552	
553	  _ensure-ready:
554	    internal: true
555	    silent: false
556	    cmds:
557	      - task: _ensure-dirs
558	      - |
559	        _has() { command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
560	
561	        MISSING=""
562	        _has node || MISSING="$MISSING node"
563	        _has pnpm || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"
564	
565	        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
566	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\n" "$MISSING"
567	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Installeer de ontbrekende tooling en run daarna 'task setup'\n"
568	          exit 1
569	        fi
570	
571	        NEED_SETUP=0
572	        REASONS=""
573	
574	        if [ ! -d "node_modules" ] || [ ! -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
575	          NEED_SETUP=1
576	          REASONS="$REASONS dependencies"
577	        fi
578	
579	        if [ -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ] && [ -f "package.json" ] && [ "package.json" -nt "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
580	          NEED_SETUP=1
581	          REASONS="$REASONS package.json"
582	        fi
583	
584	        if [ -f "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ] && [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ] && [ "pnpm-lock.yaml" -nt "node_modules/.modules.yaml" ]; then
585	          NEED_SETUP=1
586	          REASONS="$REASONS pnpm-lock.yaml"
587	        fi
588	
589	        if [ ! -f ".env" ] && [ ! -f ".env.local" ] && { [ -f ".env.example" ] || [ -f ".env.local.example" ]; }; then
590	          NEED_SETUP=1
591	          REASONS="$REASONS env"
592	        fi
593	
594	        if [ "$NEED_SETUP" = "1" ]; then
595	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Onvolledige setup gedetecteerd:%s\n" "$REASONS"
596	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Voer automatisch 'task setup' uit...\n"
597	          task setup
598	        fi
599	
600	  _ensure-dirs:
601	    internal: true
602	    cmds:
603	      - mkdir -p "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}" "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"
604	    status:
605	      - test -d "{{.RUNTIME_DIR}}"
606	      - test -d "{{.LOGS_DIR}}"
607	
608	  _kill-mode:
609	    # Stopt een bestaande service volledig voor een herstart:
610	    # 1. PID-bestand
611	    # 2. fuser op de poort als laatste noodstop
612	    internal: true
613	    vars:
614	      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
615	      PID_FILE: '{{default "" .PID_FILE}}'
616	    cmds:
617	      - |
618	        _stop_timeout="{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
619	        _pidfile="{{.PID_FILE}}"
620	        _port="{{.TARGET_PORT}}"
621	        # Stop via PID
622	        if [ -f "$_pidfile" ]; then
623	          PID=$(head -1 "$_pidfile" 2>/dev/null)
624	          if /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
625	            /bin/kill -TERM "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
626	            W=0
627	            while /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && [ "$W" -lt "$_stop_timeout" ]; do
628	              sleep 1; W=$((W+1))
629	            done
630	            /bin/kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null && /bin/kill -KILL "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
631	          fi
632	          rm -f "$_pidfile"
633	        fi
634	        # Noodstop: kill alles op de poort (orphan-processen)
635	        if [ "$_port" != "0" ] && fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
636	          fuser -k "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
637	          sleep 1
638	          fuser "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL "$_port"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
639	        fi
640	
641	  _stop-port:
642	    internal: true
643	    vars:
644	      TARGET_PORT: '{{default "0" .TARGET_PORT}}'
645	    cmds:
646	      - |
647	        if fuser {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
648	          fuser -k {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
649	          sleep 1
650	          fuser {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && fuser -k -KILL {{.TARGET_PORT}}/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
651	        fi
652	
653	  _wait-for-endpoint:
654	    internal: true
655	    silent: false
656	    vars:
657	      LABEL: '{{default "service" .LABEL}}'
658	      PORT: '{{default "0" .PORT}}'
659	      SCHEME: '{{default "http" .SCHEME}}'
660	      HOST: '{{default "127.0.0.1" .HOST}}'
661	      LOG_FILE: '{{default "" .LOG_FILE}}'
662	    cmds:
663	      - |
664	        URL="{{.SCHEME}}://{{.HOST}}:{{.PORT}}/"
665	        CURL_EXTRA=""
666	        if [ "{{.SCHEME}}" = "https" ]; then
667	          CURL_EXTRA="-k"
668	        fi
669	        ELAPSED=0
670	        READY=0
671	
672	        while [ "$ELAPSED" -lt "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}" ]; do
673	          if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
674	            CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "$URL" 2>/dev/null || true)"
675	            if [ -n "$CODE" ] && [ "$CODE" != "000" ]; then
676	              READY=1
677	              break
678	            fi
679	          elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then
680	            if fuser "{{.PORT}}"/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
681	              READY=1
682	              break
683	            fi
684	          fi
685	
686	          sleep 1
687	          ELAPSED=$((ELAPSED + 1))
688	        done
689	
690	        if [ "$READY" != "1" ]; then
691	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Start mislukt — {{.LABEL}} endpoint %s reageert niet na {{.START_TIMEOUT}}s\n" "$URL"
692	          [ -n "{{.LOG_FILE}}" ] && tail -n 20 "{{.LOG_FILE}}" 2>/dev/null || true
693	          exit 1
694	        fi
695	
696	  _show-endpoints:
697	    internal: true
698	    silent: false
699	    cmds:
700	      - |
701	        LABEL="{{.LABEL}}"
702	        PORT="{{.PORT}}"
703	        SCHEME="{{default "http" .SCHEME}}"
704	        LOCAL_HOST="127.0.0.1"
705	        if [ -n "$LABEL" ]; then
706	          printf "\033[1;36m=== %s endpoints ===\033[0m\n" "$LABEL"
707	        fi
708	        printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m local url: %s://localhost:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$PORT"
709	
710	        VPN_IP=""
711	        VPN_IF=""
712	        if command -v nmcli >/dev/null 2>&1; then
713	          VPN_IF="$(nmcli -t -f DEVICE,TYPE,STATE device status 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '$3 ~ /^connected/ && $2 ~ /^(wireguard|vpn|tun|tap)$/ {print $1; exit}')"
714	          if [ -n "$VPN_IF" ] && command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
715	            VPN_IP="$(ip -o -4 addr show dev "$VPN_IF" scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4; exit}')"
716	            VPN_IP="${VPN_IP%/*}"
717	          fi
718	        fi
719	
720	        if command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
721	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ]; then
722	            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 ~ /^(tun|tap|wg|tailscale|ppp|utun|zt|vpn)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
723	          fi
724	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
725	            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 !~ /^(lo|docker0|br-|veth|virbr|en|eth|wl|wwan)/ && $4 ~ /^(10\\.|172\\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\\.|192\\.168\\.)/ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
726	          fi
727	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -z "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
728	            VPN_LINE="$(ip -o -4 addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | awk '$4 ~ /^10\\.0\\.0\\./ {print $2, $4; exit}')"
729	          fi
730	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -n "$VPN_LINE" ]; then
731	            set -- $VPN_LINE
732	            VPN_IF="${VPN_IF:-$1}"
733	            VPN_IP="${2%/*}"
734	          fi
735	        fi
736	
737	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
738	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    %s\n" "$VPN_IP"
739	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: %s\n" "${VPN_IF:-niet beschikbaar}"
740	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
741	        else
742	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn ip:    niet beschikbaar\n"
743	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn iface: niet beschikbaar\n"
744	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m vpn url:   niet beschikbaar\n"
745	        fi
746	
747	        if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
748	          CURL_EXTRA=""
749	          if [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ]; then
750	            CURL_EXTRA="-k"
751	          fi
752	
753	          LOCAL_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${LOCAL_HOST}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
754	          if [ -n "$LOCAL_CODE" ] && [ "$LOCAL_CODE" != "000" ]; then
755	            printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m local endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$LOCAL_CODE"
756	          else
757	            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m local endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$LOCAL_HOST" "$PORT"
758	          fi
759	
760	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
761	            VPN_CODE="$(curl $CURL_EXTRA -s -o /dev/null --max-time 2 -w '%{http_code}' "${SCHEME}://${VPN_IP}:${PORT}/" 2>/dev/null || true)"
762	            if [ -n "$VPN_CODE" ] && [ "$VPN_CODE" != "000" ]; then
763	              printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert (%s)\n" "$VPN_CODE"
764	            else
765	              printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m vpn endpoint reageert niet via %s://%s:%s\n" "$SCHEME" "$VPN_IP" "$PORT"
766	            fi
767	          fi
768	        fi
769	
770	        if [ "$SCHEME" = "https" ] && [ -n "$VPN_IP" ] && [ -f "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" ] && command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
771	          if ! openssl x509 -in "{{.DEV_CERT_FILE}}" -noout -ext subjectAltName 2>/dev/null | grep -Fq "IP Address:${VPN_IP}"; then
772	            printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m HTTPS certificaat bevat %s niet; browser kan een certificaatwaarschuwing tonen op het vpn-adres\n" "$VPN_IP"
773	          fi
774	        fi
775

1	# ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
2	# ║                  RUBRICS OBSERVATIE TOOL - TASKFILE                     ║
3	# ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
4	#
5	#   task                   Kerncommando's (dit scherm)
6	#   task setup             Eerste installatie
7	#   task help-all          Alle beschikbare tasks
8	#
9	# Namespaces:
10	#   native:     Dev zonder Docker    (native:start/stop/status/logs)
11	#   docker:     Dev met Docker       (docker:start-kleuter / docker:stop)
12	#   demo:       Demo dataset         (demo:guide / demo:observaties / demo:status)
13	#   prod:       Productie op /srv    (prod:guide / prod:kleuter:status / prod:lager:status)
14	#   monitoring: Uptime Kuma          (monitoring:start / monitoring:stop)
15	#
16	# Documentatie: https://taskfile.dev
17	
18	version: "3"
19	silent: true
20	dotenv: [".env", ".env.local"]
21	
22	includes:
23	  core:
24	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/core.yml
25	    optional: false
26	  project:
27	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/project.yml
28	    optional: true
29	  native:
30	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/native.yml
31	    optional: false
32	  docker:
33	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/docker.yml
34	    optional: false
35	  prod:
36	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/prod.yml
37	    optional: false
38	  demo:
39	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/demo.yml
40	    optional: false
41	  monitoring:
42	    taskfile: ./taskfiles/monitoring.yml
43	    optional: false
44	
45	vars:
46	  PYTHON:
47	    sh: if [ "{{OS}}" = "windows" ]; then echo "python"; else echo "python3"; fi
48	  VENV_DIR: venv
49	  VENV_BIN:
50	    sh: if [ "{{OS}}" = "windows" ]; then echo "venv/Scripts"; else echo "venv/bin"; fi
51	  VENV_PYTHON: "{{.VENV_BIN}}/python"
52	  VENV_PIP: "{{.VENV_BIN}}/pip"
53	  PRODUCT_VARIANT: '{{default "kleuter" .PRODUCT_VARIANT}}'
54	
55	tasks:
56	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
57	  # HELP
58	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
59	
60	  default:
61	    cmds:
62	      - task: help
63	
64	  help:
65	    desc: "Toon kerncommando's"
66	    cmds:
67	      - |
68	        cat << 'EOF'
69	
70	        ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
71	        ║            RUBRICS OBSERVATIE TOOL — KERNCOMMANDO'S          ║
72	        ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
73	
74	          NATIVE DEV
75	          task native:start           Start backend + frontend (kleuter)
76	          task native:stop            Stop alle native services
77	          task native:status          Status: services, poorten, databases
78	          task native:logs            Toon logs (interactief)
79	
80	          PRODUCTIE (/srv Docker)
81	          task prod:guide             Overzicht, varianten en veilige flow
82	          task prod:kleuter:status    Status kleuter (actief)
83	          task prod:kleuter:deploy    Deploy kleuter naar /srv
84	          task prod:kleuter:rollback  Rollback kleuter
85	
86	          DEMO
87	          task demo:guide             Demo kleuter/lager en verschil met echte data
88	
89	          OVERIG
90	          task setup                  Eerste installatie (venv + deps + DB)
91	          task test                   Run tests
92	          task doctor                 Controleer vereiste tools
93	          task endpoints              Toon URLs (localhost + VPN)
94	          task help-all               Alle beschikbare tasks
95	
96	        EOF
97	
98	  help-all:
99	    desc: "Toon alle beschikbare tasks"
100	    cmds:
101	      - task --list-all
102	
103	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
104	  # SETUP & INSTALLATIE
105	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
106	
107	  setup:
108	    desc: "Eerste setup: venv + dependencies + database"
109	    cmds:
110	      - |
111	        echo "Setting up project..."
112	        echo ""
113	
114	        if [ ! -d "{{.VENV_DIR}}" ]; then
115	          echo "Creating virtual environment..."
116	          {{.PYTHON}} -m venv {{.VENV_DIR}}
117	          echo "Virtual environment created!"
118	          echo ""
119	        else
120	          echo "Virtual environment already exists"
121	          echo ""
122	        fi
123	
124	        echo "Upgrading pip..."
125	        {{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m pip install --upgrade pip
126	        echo ""
127	
128	        echo "Installing backend dependencies..."
129	        {{.VENV_PIP}} install -r backend/requirements.txt
130	        echo ""
131	
132	        if ! command -v npm &> /dev/null; then
133	          echo "npm not found. Install Node.js first: https://nodejs.org/"
134	          exit 1
135	        fi
136	
137	        echo "Installing frontend dependencies..."
138	        cd frontend && npm install
139	        echo ""
140	
141	        echo "Creating project directories..."
142	        mkdir -p logs data backend-data
143	        echo ""
144	
145	        echo "Bootstrapping .env..."
146	        task bootstrap-env
147	        echo ""
148	
149	        echo "Initializing variant databases..."
150	        task native:init-varianten
151	        echo ""
152	
153	        echo "Setup complete!"
154	        echo ""
155	        echo "Quick start:"
156	        echo "  task native:start   # Start services"
157	        echo "  task native:status  # Check status"
158	        echo ""
159	
160	  install:
161	    desc: "Installeer/update dependencies (venv moet al bestaan)"
162	    preconditions:
163	      - sh: test -d {{.VENV_DIR}}
164	        msg: "Virtual environment niet gevonden. Run eerst: task setup"
165	    cmds:
166	      - echo "Installing/updating dependencies..."
167	      - "{{.VENV_PIP}} install -r backend/requirements.txt"
168	      - cd frontend && npm install
169	      - echo "Dependencies updated!"
170	
171	  dev-install:
172	    desc: "Installeer development dependencies (pylint, black, ruff, pytest)"
173	    preconditions:
174	      - sh: test -d {{.VENV_DIR}}
175	        msg: "Virtual environment niet gevonden. Run eerst: task setup"
176	    cmds:
177	      - echo "Installing development tools..."
178	      - "{{.VENV_PIP}} install pylint flake8 black pytest pytest-cov ruff"
179	      - echo "Development tools installed!"
180	
181	  bootstrap-env:
182	    desc: "Maak of herstel .env voor lokale start"
183	    cmds:
184	      - "{{.PYTHON}} scripts/ensure_env.py"
185	
186	  check-credentials:
187	    desc: "Controleer of Google credentials aanwezig zijn"
188	    cmds:
189	      - |
190	        if [ -f oauthCredentialsGoogle.json ]; then
191	          echo "Google OAuth credentials found"
192	        else
193	          echo "Google OAuth credentials NOT found"
194	          echo "Kopieer en vul in vanuit de template:"
195	          echo "  cp oauthCredentialsGoogle.json.example oauthCredentialsGoogle.json"
196	          echo "  (vul client_id, project_id en client_secret in via Google Cloud Console)"
197	          echo "Zie: docs/CREDENTIALS_SETUP.md"
198	        fi
199	
200	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
201	  # TESTEN & OPRUIMEN
202	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
203	
204	  test:
205	    desc: "Run alle tests"
206	    cmds:
207	      - |
208	        echo "Testing backend..."
209	        if curl -s http://localhost:14676/api/health > /dev/null; then
210	          echo "Backend is running and healthy"
211	        else
212	          echo "Backend is not responding (is native:start uitgevoerd?)"
213	          exit 1
214	        fi
215	
216	  clean:
217	    desc: "Veilige clean: verwijder cache, logs en frontend build artifacts"
218	    cmds:
219	      - echo "Stopping services..."
220	      - task: native:stop
221	      - |
222	        echo "Removing Python cache..."
223	        find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
224	        find . -type f -name "*.pyc" -delete
225	        find . -type d -name "*.egg-info" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
226	        echo "Removing logs..."
227	        rm -rf logs
228	        echo "Removing build artifacts..."
229	        rm -rf frontend/dist
230	        echo "Cleanup complete!"
231	
232	  clean:full:
233	    desc: "Zware reset: verwijder ook venv en frontend/node_modules"
234	    cmds:
235	      - task: clean
236	      - |
237	        echo "Removing virtual environment..."
238	        rm -rf {{.VENV_DIR}}
239	        echo "Removing node_modules..."
240	        rm -rf frontend/node_modules
241	        echo "Full cleanup complete!"
242	
243	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
244	  # DATA TOOLS
245	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
246	
247	  run-analyzer:
248	    desc: "Voer Google Sheets analyzer uit"
249	    preconditions:
250	      - sh: test -d {{.VENV_DIR}}
251	        msg: "Virtual environment niet gevonden. Run eerst: task setup"
252	    cmds:
253	      - "{{.VENV_PYTHON}} scripts/google_sheets_analyzer.py"
254	
255	  import-data:
256	    desc: "Import data van Google Sheets naar database"
257	    preconditions:
258	      - sh: test -d {{.VENV_DIR}}
259	        msg: "Virtual environment niet gevonden. Run eerst: task setup"
260	    cmds:
261	      - "{{.VENV_PYTHON}} scripts/import_from_sheets.py"
262

519	      - task: prod:deploy

521	  deploy-status:

523	      - task: prod:status

526	
527	  s:
528	    cmds:
529	      - task: native:start
530	  x:
531	    cmds:
532	      - task: native:stop

534	    cmds:
535	      - task: native:restart

537	    cmds:

541	      - task: native:logs

1	# taskfiles/core.yml — Core helpers: endpoints, health-check
2	# Rubrics Observatie Tool
3	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
4	# Gegenereerd via M3 Taskfile Suite v3.0.0
5	version: "3"
6	silent: true
7	
8	vars:
9	  PORT_FRONTEND: '{{default "14675" .PORT_FRONTEND}}'
10	  PORT_BACKEND: '{{default "14676" .PORT_BACKEND}}'
11	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
12	
13	tasks:
14	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
15	  # 🌐 ENDPOINTS
16	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
17	  endpoints:
18	    desc: Toon alle beschikbare URLs (frontend + backend + VPN)
19	    cmds:
20	      - task: _show-endpoints
21	
22	  _show-endpoints:
23	    internal: true
24	    cmds:
25	      - cmd: |
26	          # Gebruik de project-eigen shell-utils.sh voor VPN-detectie
27	          # (get_vpn_device_ip is interface-agnostisch: tailscale/wg/tun/ppp/zt)
28	          source scripts/shell-utils.sh
29	          VPN_CONFIGURED="{{.VPN_IP}}"
30	          if [ -n "$VPN_CONFIGURED" ]; then
31	            DISPLAY_VPN="$VPN_CONFIGURED"
32	            VPN_LABEL="(manueel)"
33	          else
34	            DISPLAY_VPN="$(get_vpn_device_ip 2>/dev/null || true)"
35	            VPN_LABEL="(auto)"
36	          fi
37	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m ── URLs ──────────────────────────────────────────\n"
38	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Frontend: http://localhost:{{.PORT_FRONTEND}}\n"
39	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Backend:  http://localhost:{{.PORT_BACKEND}}\n"
40	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m API Docs: http://localhost:{{.PORT_BACKEND}}/docs\n"
41	          if [ -n "$DISPLAY_VPN" ]; then
42	            printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Frontend: http://%s:{{.PORT_FRONTEND}}  %s\n" "$DISPLAY_VPN" "$VPN_LABEL"
43	            printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Backend:  http://%s:{{.PORT_BACKEND}}  %s\n" "$DISPLAY_VPN" "$VPN_LABEL"
44	          else
45	            printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m VPN:      niet beschikbaar\n"
46	          fi
47	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\n"
48	        platforms: [linux, darwin]
49	      - cmd: |
50	          Write-Host "[INFO] Frontend: http://localhost:{{.PORT_FRONTEND}}"
51	          Write-Host "[INFO] Backend:  http://localhost:{{.PORT_BACKEND}}"
52	          $vpnIp = "{{.VPN_IP}}"
53	          if (-not $vpnIp) {
54	            $vpnIp = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {
55	              $_.IPAddress -match '^10\.' -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback|vEthernet'
56	            } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress)
57	          }
58	          if ($vpnIp) {
59	            Write-Host "[INFO] Frontend: http://${vpnIp}:{{.PORT_FRONTEND}}  (vpn)"
60	            Write-Host "[INFO] Backend:  http://${vpnIp}:{{.PORT_BACKEND}}  (vpn)"
61	          } else {
62	            Write-Host "[INFO] VPN:      niet beschikbaar"
63	          }
64	        platforms: [windows]
65	
66	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
67	  # 🩺 HEALTH CHECK
68	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
69	  doctor:
70	    desc: Health-check — vereiste tools en directories aanwezig?
71	    cmds:
72	      - |
73	        MISSING=""
74	        command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING python3"
75	        command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING node"
76	        command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING npm"
77	        test -d "venv" || MISSING="$MISSING venv(hint:task setup)"
78	        test -f ".env" || MISSING="$MISSING .env(hint:cp .env.example .env)"
79	        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
80	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m Ontbrekende tools/bestanden:%s\n" "$MISSING"
81	          exit 1
82	        fi
83	        command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Docker beschikbaar\n" || \
84	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m Docker niet gevonden (niet vereist voor native dev)\n"
85	        printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Alle vereiste tools aanwezig\n"
86

1	# taskfiles/project.yml — Projectspecifieke kwaliteits- en buildtaken
2	# Rubrics Observatie Tool
3	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
4	# Gegenereerd via M3 Taskfile Suite v3.0.0
5	version: "3"
6	silent: true
7	
8	vars:
9	  VENV_PYTHON: '{{default "venv/bin/python" .VENV_PYTHON}}'
10	  VENV_PIP: '{{default "venv/bin/pip" .VENV_PIP}}'
11	
12	tasks:
13	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
14	  # 🏗️ BUILD
15	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
16	  build:
17	    desc: Build frontend voor productie (kleuter variant)
18	    cmds:
19	      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Building frontend (kleuter)...\n"
20	      - cd frontend && VITE_PRODUCT_VARIANT=kleuter npm run build
21	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build voltooid\n"
22	
23	  build-kleuter:
24	    desc: Build frontend (kleuter variant)
25	    cmds:
26	      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Building frontend (kleuter)...\n"
27	      - cd frontend && VITE_PRODUCT_VARIANT=kleuter npm run build
28	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build kleuter voltooid\n"
29	
30	  build-lager:
31	    desc: Build frontend (lager/KUC variant)
32	    cmds:
33	      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Building frontend (lager)...\n"
34	      - cd frontend && VITE_PRODUCT_VARIANT=lager npm run build
35	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Build lager voltooid\n"
36	
37	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
38	  # 🧪 QUALITY
39	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
40	  test:
41	    desc: Run backend tests (pytest)
42	    cmds:
43	      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Running tests...\n"
44	      - "{{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m pytest backend/tests/ -v"
45	
46	  lint:
47	    desc: Lint backend code (ruff + pylint)
48	    cmds:
49	      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Linting...\n"
50	      - "{{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m ruff check backend/app || true"
51	      - "{{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m pylint backend/app || true"
52	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Lint klaar\n"
53	
54	  format:
55	    desc: Format backend code (black)
56	    cmds:
57	      - printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m Formatting...\n"
58	      - "{{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m black backend/app backend/*.py"
59	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m Code geformatteerd\n"
60	
61	  check:
62	    desc: Lint + format check (CI-equivalent)
63	    cmds:
64	      - task: lint
65	      - printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m check geslaagd\n"
66

1	# taskfiles/core.yml — lifecycle & infra voor kalendertool
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken (behalve help)
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  # ── Project identity ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
8	  APP_NAME: '{{default "kalendertool" .APP_NAME}}'
9	
10	  # ── Directories ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
11	  BACKEND_DIR: '{{default "backend" .BACKEND_DIR}}'
12	  FRONTEND_DIR: '{{default "frontend" .FRONTEND_DIR}}'
13	  VENV_DIR: '{{default "backend/.venv" .VENV_DIR}}'
14	
15	  # ── Runtime ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
16	  RUNTIME_DIR: .task
17	  PID_DIR: .task/pids
18	  LOG_DIR: .task/logs
19	  BACKEND_PID: .task/pids/backend.pid
20	  BACKEND_PGID: .task/pids/backend.pgid
21	  BACKEND_LOG: .task/logs/backend.log
22	  FRONTEND_PID: .task/pids/frontend.pid
23	  FRONTEND_PGID: .task/pids/frontend.pgid
24	  FRONTEND_LOG: .task/logs/frontend.log
25	  PROD_BACKEND_PID: .task/pids/backend-prod.pid
26	  PROD_BACKEND_PGID: .task/pids/backend-prod.pgid
27	  PROD_BACKEND_LOG: .task/logs/backend-prod.log
28	  PROD_FRONTEND_PID: .task/pids/frontend-prod.pid
29	  PROD_FRONTEND_PGID: .task/pids/frontend-prod.pgid
30	  PROD_FRONTEND_LOG: .task/logs/frontend-prod.log
31	
32	  # ── Ports ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
33	  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "24775" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
34	  BACKEND_PORT: '{{default "24776" .BACKEND_PORT}}'
35	  PROD_FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "24875" .PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}}'
36	  PROD_BACKEND_PORT: '{{default "24876" .PROD_BACKEND_PORT}}'
37	
38	  # ── Docker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
39	  USE_DOCKER: '{{default "0" .USE_DOCKER}}'
40	  DOCKER_SERVICE: '{{default "" .DOCKER_SERVICE}}'
41	
42	  # ── VPN ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
43	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
44	
45	  # ── Timeouts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
46	  START_TIMEOUT: '{{default "60" .START_TIMEOUT}}'
47	  STOP_TIMEOUT: '{{default "15" .STOP_TIMEOUT}}'
48	
49	tasks:
50	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
51	  # 📚 HELP
52	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
53	  help:
54	    desc: Toon beschikbare taken
55	    silent: false
56	    cmds:
57	      - |
58	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
59	        printf "\033[1mfrontend:\033[0m  port %s\n" "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
60	        printf "\033[1mbackend:\033[0m   port %s\n" "{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
61	        printf "\033[1mmode:\033[0m      %s\n" "$( [ '{{.USE_DOCKER}}' = '1' ] && echo docker || echo local )"
62	        printf "\n\033[1;33mLifecycle:\033[0m\n"
63	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m       bootstrap dependencies\n"
64	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m       start backend + frontend\n"
65	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m        stop backend + frontend\n"
66	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m     herstart services\n"
67	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m      service status\n"
68	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m        volg logs\n"
69	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:start\033[0m  start productie backend + frontend\n"
70	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:stop\033[0m   stop productie backend + frontend\n"
71	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:restart\033[0m herstart productie services\n"
72	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:status\033[0m service status productie\n"
73	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:logs\033[0m   volg productielogs\n"
74	        printf "  \033[32mtask clean\033[0m       verwijder artefacten\n"
75	        printf "\n\033[1;33mProject:\033[0m\n"
76	        printf "  \033[32mtask build\033[0m       build frontend\n"
77	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:build\033[0m  build productieversie\n"
78	        printf "  \033[32mtask prod:rebuild\033[0m rebuild + restart productie\n"
79	        printf "  \033[32mtask test\033[0m        run backend tests\n"
80	        printf "  \033[32mtask lint\033[0m        lint backend + frontend\n"
81	        printf "  \033[32mtask fmt\033[0m         formatteer code\n"
82	        printf "  \033[32mtask config\033[0m      genereer .env.local\n"
83	        printf "\n\033[1;33mDatabase:\033[0m\n"
84	        printf "  \033[32mtask db:migrate\033[0m  run pending migrations\n"
85	        printf "  \033[32mtask db:revision\033[0m autogenerate migration\n"
86	        printf "  \033[32mtask db:history\033[0m  migratie geschiedenis\n"
87	        printf "  \033[32mtask db:current\033[0m  huidige revisie\n"
88	        printf "\n"
89	
90	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
91	  # 📦 SETUP
92	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
93	  setup:
94	    desc: Bootstrap dependencies + health-check
95	    cmds:
96	      - task: _ensure-dirs
97	      - task: install
98	      - task: doctor
99	      - printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Setup voltooid\\n"
100	
101	  install:
102	    desc: Installeer backend + frontend dependencies
103	    cmds:
104	      - |
105	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Backend dependencies installeren...\\n"
106	        if [ ! -d "{{.VENV_DIR}}" ]; then
107	          python3 -m venv "{{.VENV_DIR}}"
108	        fi
109	        "{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python" -m pip install -U pip >/dev/null
110	        "{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python" -m pip install -e "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" >/dev/null
111	        cd "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" && .venv/bin/alembic upgrade head 2>/dev/null || true
112	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Backend dependencies geïnstalleerd\\n"
113	      - |
114	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Frontend dependencies installeren...\\n"
115	        cd "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" && pnpm install
116	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Frontend dependencies geïnstalleerd\\n"
117	
118	  doctor:
119	    desc: Health-check — vereiste tools aanwezig?
120	    cmds:
121	      - |
122	        MISSING=""
123	        command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING node"
124	        command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING python3"
125	        command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING pnpm"
126	        [ "{{.USE_DOCKER}}" = "1" ] && ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 && MISSING="$MISSING docker"
127	        if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then
128	          printf "\\033[31m[ERR]\\033[0m Ontbrekende tools:%s\\n" "$MISSING"
129	          exit 1
130	        fi
131	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Alle vereiste tools aanwezig\\n"
132	
133	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
134	  # 🚀 LIFECYCLE
135	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
136	  start:
137	    desc: Start backend + frontend
138	    cmds:
139	      - task: _ensure-dirs
140	      - task: _start-backend
141	      - task: _start-frontend
142	      - task: _show-endpoints
143	
144	  stop:
145	    desc: Stop backend + frontend
146	    cmds:
147	      - ./scripts/stop_service.sh backend "{{.BACKEND_PORT}}" "{{.BACKEND_PID}}" "{{.BACKEND_PGID}}" "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
148	      - ./scripts/stop_service.sh frontend "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PID}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PGID}}" "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
149	
150	  restart:
151	    desc: Herstart backend + frontend
152	    cmds:
153	      - task: stop
154	      - sleep 2
155	      - task: start
156	
157	  prod:start:
158	    desc: Start productie backend + frontend
159	    cmds:
160	      - task: _ensure-dirs
161	      - |
162	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Productiebuild frontend...\\n"
163	        cd "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" && pnpm run build
164	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Productiebuild voltooid\\n"
165	      - task: _start-backend-prod
166	      - task: _start-frontend-prod
167	      - task: _show-prod-endpoints
168	
169	  prod:stop:
170	    desc: Stop productie backend + frontend
171	    cmds:
172	      - ./scripts/stop_service.sh backend-prod "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PID}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PGID}}" "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
173	      - ./scripts/stop_service.sh frontend-prod "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PID}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PGID}}" "{{.STOP_TIMEOUT}}"
174	
175	  prod:restart:
176	    desc: Herstart productie backend + frontend
177	    cmds:
178	      - task: prod:stop
179	      - sleep 2
180	      - task: prod:start
181	
182	  prod:status:
183	    desc: Service status productie
184	    cmds:
185	      - ./scripts/status_service.sh backend-prod "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PID}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PGID}}"
186	      - ./scripts/status_service.sh frontend-prod "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PID}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PGID}}"
187	      - task: _show-prod-endpoints
188	
189	  prod:logs:
190	    desc: Volg productielogs
191	    cmds:
192	      - |
193	        test -f "{{.PROD_BACKEND_LOG}}" || touch "{{.PROD_BACKEND_LOG}}"
194	        test -f "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_LOG}}" || touch "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_LOG}}"
195	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Volgen van productielogs (Ctrl+C om te stoppen)\\n"
196	        tail -f "{{.PROD_BACKEND_LOG}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_LOG}}"
197	
198	  logs:
199	    desc: Volg logs
200	    cmds:
201	      - |
202	        test -f "{{.BACKEND_LOG}}" || touch "{{.BACKEND_LOG}}"
203	        test -f "{{.FRONTEND_LOG}}" || touch "{{.FRONTEND_LOG}}"
204	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Volgen van logs (Ctrl+C om te stoppen)\\n"
205	        tail -f "{{.BACKEND_LOG}}" "{{.FRONTEND_LOG}}"
206	
207	  status:
208	    desc: Service status
209	    cmds:
210	      - ./scripts/status_service.sh backend "{{.BACKEND_PORT}}" "{{.BACKEND_PID}}" "{{.BACKEND_PGID}}"
211	      - ./scripts/status_service.sh frontend "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PID}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PGID}}"
212	      - task: _show-endpoints
213	
214	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
215	  # 🧹 MAINTENANCE
216	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
217	  clean:
218	    desc: Verwijder build-artefacten
219	    cmds:
220	      - |
221	        rm -rf dist build out coverage 2>/dev/null || true
222	        rm -rf "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}/.next" "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}/out" 2>/dev/null || true
223	        rm -f "{{.PID_DIR}}"/*.pid "{{.PID_DIR}}"/*.pgid 2>/dev/null || true
224	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Opgeruimd\\n"
225	
226	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
227	  # 🔧 INTERNAL
228	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
229	  _ensure-dirs:
230	    internal: true
231	    cmds:
232	      - mkdir -p "{{.PID_DIR}}" "{{.LOG_DIR}}"
233	    status:
234	      - test -d "{{.PID_DIR}}"
235	      - test -d "{{.LOG_DIR}}"
236	
237	  _start-backend:
238	    internal: true
239	    cmds:
240	      - ./scripts/start_backend.sh "{{.VENV_DIR}}" "{{.BACKEND_PID}}" "{{.BACKEND_PGID}}" "{{.BACKEND_LOG}}" "{{.BACKEND_PORT}}" "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}"
241	
242	  _start-frontend:
243	    internal: true
244	    cmds:
245	      - ./scripts/start_frontend.sh "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PID}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PGID}}" "{{.FRONTEND_LOG}}" "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}" "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}"
246	
247	  _start-backend-prod:
248	    internal: true
249	    cmds:
250	      - ./scripts/start_backend_prod.sh "{{.VENV_DIR}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PID}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PGID}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_LOG}}" "{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}}" "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}"
251	
252	  _start-frontend-prod:
253	    internal: true
254	    cmds:
255	      - ./scripts/start_frontend_prod.sh "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PID}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PGID}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_LOG}}" "{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}}" "{{.START_TIMEOUT}}"
256	
257	  _show-endpoints:
258	    internal: true
259	    silent: true
260	    cmds:
261	      - cmd: |
262	          VPN_IP="{{.VPN_IP}}"
263	          VPN_IFACE=""
264	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
265	            VPN_IFACE="(manueel)"
266	          else
267	            VPN_DATA="$(ip -4 addr 2>/dev/null | awk '
268	              /^[0-9]+:/ { iface=$2; sub(/:$/,"",iface) }
269	              /inet / && iface !~ /^(lo|docker|br-|veth|eth|en|wl)/ {
270	                split($2,a,"/"); print iface " " a[1]; exit
271	              }' 2>/dev/null || true)"
272	            if [ -n "$VPN_DATA" ]; then
273	              VPN_IFACE=$(echo "$VPN_DATA" | awk '{print $1}')
274	              VPN_IP=$(echo "$VPN_DATA" | awk '{print $2}')
275	            else
276	              VPN_IP="$(ip -4 addr 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)10\.0\.0\.\d+' | head -1 || true)"
277	              [ -n "$VPN_IP" ] && VPN_IFACE="(10.0.0.0/24)"
278	            fi
279	          fi
280	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m local:  http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} (frontend)\\n"
281	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m local:  http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} (backend)\\n"
282	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
283	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m vpn:    http://%s:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} (frontend) [%s]\\n" "$VPN_IP" "$VPN_IFACE"
284	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m vpn:    http://%s:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} (backend)  [%s]\\n" "$VPN_IP" "$VPN_IFACE"
285	          else
286	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m vpn:    niet beschikbaar\\n"
287	          fi
288	        platforms: [linux, darwin]
289	      - cmd: |
290	          $localFrontend = "http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
291	          $localBackend = "http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
292	          Write-Host "[INFO] local: $localFrontend (frontend)"
293	          Write-Host "[INFO] local: $localBackend (backend)"
294	          $vpnIp = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {
295	            $_.IPAddress -match '^10\.0\.0\.' -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback|vEthernet'
296	          } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress)
297	          if ($vpnIp) {
298	            Write-Host "[INFO] vpn:   http://${vpnIp}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}} (frontend)"
299	            Write-Host "[INFO] vpn:   http://${vpnIp}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}} (backend)"
300	          } else {
301	            Write-Host "[INFO] vpn:   niet beschikbaar"
302	          }
303	        platforms: [windows]
304	
305	  _show-prod-endpoints:
306	    internal: true
307	    silent: true
308	    cmds:
309	      - cmd: |
310	          VPN_IP="{{.VPN_IP}}"
311	          VPN_IFACE=""
312	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
313	            VPN_IFACE="(manueel)"
314	          else
315	            VPN_DATA="$(ip -4 addr 2>/dev/null | awk '
316	              /^[0-9]+:/ { iface=$2; sub(/:$/,"",iface) }
317	              /inet / && iface !~ /^(lo|docker|br-|veth|eth|en|wl)/ {
318	                split($2,a,"/"); print iface " " a[1]; exit
319	              }' 2>/dev/null || true)"
320	            if [ -n "$VPN_DATA" ]; then
321	              VPN_IFACE=$(echo "$VPN_DATA" | awk '{print $1}')
322	              VPN_IP=$(echo "$VPN_DATA" | awk '{print $2}')
323	            else
324	              VPN_IP="$(ip -4 addr 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)10\.0\.0\.\d+' | head -1 || true)"
325	              [ -n "$VPN_IP" ] && VPN_IFACE="(10.0.0.0/24)"
326	            fi
327	          fi
328	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m prod local:  http://localhost:{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}} (frontend)\\n"
329	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m prod local:  http://localhost:{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}} (backend)\\n"
330	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
331	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m prod vpn:    http://%s:{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}} (frontend) [%s]\\n" "$VPN_IP" "$VPN_IFACE"
332	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m prod vpn:    http://%s:{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}} (backend)  [%s]\\n" "$VPN_IP" "$VPN_IFACE"
333	          else
334	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m prod vpn:    niet beschikbaar\\n"
335	          fi
336	        platforms: [linux, darwin]
337	      - cmd: |
338	          $localFrontend = "http://localhost:{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}}"
339	          $localBackend = "http://localhost:{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}}"
340	          Write-Host "[INFO] prod local: $localFrontend (frontend)"
341	          Write-Host "[INFO] prod local: $localBackend (backend)"
342	          $vpnIp = (Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {
343	            $_.IPAddress -match '^10\.0\.0\.' -and $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback|vEthernet'
344	          } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress)
345	          if ($vpnIp) {
346	            Write-Host "[INFO] prod vpn:   http://${vpnIp}:{{.PROD_FRONTEND_PORT}} (frontend)"
347	            Write-Host "[INFO] prod vpn:   http://${vpnIp}:{{.PROD_BACKEND_PORT}} (backend)"
348	          } else {
349	            Write-Host "[INFO] prod vpn:   niet beschikbaar"
350	          }
351	        platforms: [windows]
352

1	# taskfiles/project.yml — project-specifieke taken voor kalendertool
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  BACKEND_DIR: '{{default "backend" .BACKEND_DIR}}'
8	  FRONTEND_DIR: '{{default "frontend" .FRONTEND_DIR}}'
9	  VENV_DIR: '{{default "backend/.venv" .VENV_DIR}}'
10	  BACKEND_PORT: '{{default "24776" .BACKEND_PORT}}'
11	  API_HOST: '{{default "" .API_HOST}}'
12	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
13	
14	tasks:
15	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
16	  # 🏗️ BUILD
17	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
18	  build:
19	    desc: Build frontend voor productie
20	    cmds:
21	      - |
22	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Building frontend...\\n"
23	        cd "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" && pnpm run build
24	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Build voltooid\\n"
25	
26	  prod-build:
27	    desc: Build productieversie van frontend
28	    cmds:
29	      - |
30	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Productiebuild frontend...\\n"
31	        cd "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" && pnpm run build
32	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Productiebuild voltooid\\n"
33	
34	  prod-rebuild:
35	    desc: Schone rebuild en herstart van productieversie
36	    cmds:
37	      - |
38	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Frontend build artefacten opschonen...\\n"
39	        rm -rf "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}/.next"
40	      - task: core:prod:stop
41	      - task: prod-build
42	      - task: core:prod:start
43	
44	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
45	  # 🧪 QUALITY
46	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
47	  test:
48	    desc: Run backend tests
49	    cmds:
50	      - |
51	        cd "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -v
52	
53	  lint:
54	    desc: Lint backend + frontend
55	    cmds:
56	      - |
57	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Backend lint (ruff)...\\n"
58	        "{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python" -m ruff check "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}"
59	      - |
60	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Frontend lint...\\n"
61	        cd "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" && pnpm run lint
62	      - printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Lint geslaagd\\n"
63	
64	  format:
65	    desc: Formatteer backend + frontend
66	    cmds:
67	      - |
68	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Backend format (ruff)...\\n"
69	        "{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python" -m ruff format "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}"
70	      - |
71	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Frontend format (prettier)...\\n"
72	        cd "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" && pnpm run format
73	      - printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Formatting voltooid\\n"
74	
75	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
76	  # ⚙️ CONFIG
77	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
78	  config:
79	    desc: Genereer .env.local met huidige instellingen
80	    cmds:
81	      - |
82	        API_HOST="{{.API_HOST}}"
83	        if [ -z "$API_HOST" ]; then
84	          # Auto-detect VPN IP
85	          VPN_IP="{{.VPN_IP}}"
86	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ]; then
87	            VPN_IP="$(ip -4 addr 2>/dev/null | awk '
88	              /^[0-9]+:/ { iface=$2; sub(/:$/,"",iface) }
89	              /inet / && iface !~ /^(lo|docker|br-|veth|eth|en|wl)/ {
90	                split($2,a,"/"); print a[1]; exit
91	              }' 2>/dev/null || true)"
92	          fi
93	          if [ -z "$VPN_IP" ]; then
94	            VPN_IP="$(ip -4 addr 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)10\.0\.0\.\d+' | head -1 || true)"
95	          fi
96	          [ -n "$VPN_IP" ] && API_HOST="$VPN_IP" || API_HOST="localhost"
97	        fi
98	        echo "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://${API_HOST}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}" > "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}/.env.local"
99	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m Gegenereerd: {{.FRONTEND_DIR}}/.env.local (host=%s)\\n" "$API_HOST"
100	
101	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
102	  # 🗄️ DATABASE
103	  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
104	  db-migrate:
105	    desc: Run pending database migrations (Alembic upgrade head)
106	    cmds:
107	      - |
108	        cd "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" && .venv/bin/alembic upgrade head
109	
110	  db-revision:
111	    desc: "Autogenerate a new migration (set MSG='your message')"
112	    cmds:
113	      - |
114	        cd "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" && .venv/bin/alembic revision --autogenerate -m "{{.MSG}}"
115	
116	  db-history:
117	    desc: Toon Alembic migratie geschiedenis
118	    cmds:
119	      - |
120	        cd "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" && .venv/bin/alembic history --verbose
121	
122	  db-current:
123	    desc: Toon huidige database revisie
124	    cmds:
125	      - |
126	        cd "{{.BACKEND_DIR}}" && .venv/bin/alembic current
127

1	# Taskfile.yml — vscodeExt_combineFilesToOne
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
3	version: '3'

18	tasks:
19	  default:
20	    desc: Toon beschikbare taken

1	# taskfiles/core.yml — vscodeExt_combineFilesToOne
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  APP_NAME: '{{default "vs-file-tools" .APP_NAME}}'
8	  DEV_CMD: '{{default "pnpm run watch" .DEV_CMD}}'
9	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
10	
11	tasks:
12	  help:
13	    desc: Toon beschikbare taken
14	    silent: false
15	    cmds:
16	      - |
17	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== VSFileTools Extension ===\033[0m\n"
18	        printf "\033[1mextensie:\033[0m  %s\n" "{{.APP_NAME}}"
19	        printf "\033[1mversie:\033[0m    %s\n" "$(node -p "require('./package.json').version" 2>/dev/null || echo '?')"
20	        printf "\033[1mruntime:\033[0m   local (TypeScript watch)\n"
21	        printf "\n\033[1;33mCore commands:\033[0m\n"
22	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m     start TypeScript watcher\n"
23	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m      stop TypeScript watcher\n"
24	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m   herstart watcher\n"
25	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m      toon watcher output\n"
26	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m    watcher status\n"
27	        printf "\n\033[1;33mDev commands:\033[0m\n"
28	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:compile\033[0m    eenmalig compileren\n"
29	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:lint\033[0m       ESLint uitvoeren\n"
30	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:test\033[0m       tests uitvoeren\n"
31	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:package\033[0m    .vsix pakket bouwen\n"
32	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:validate\033[0m   alle validaties uitvoeren\n"
33	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:publish\033[0m    publiceren naar Marketplace\n"
34	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev:publish:dry\033[0m  dry-run publiceren\n"
35	        printf "\n\033[1;33mGit workflow commands:\033[0m\n"
36	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:status\033[0m   overzicht branches & open PR's\n"
37	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:branch\033[0m   nieuwe branch starten\n"
38	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:pr\033[0m       PR aanmaken naar dev_main\n"
39	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:merge\033[0m    PR mergen + branch verwijderen (lokaal + remote)\n"
40	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:promote\033[0m  dev_main → main (release)\n"
41	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:publish\033[0m  manual publish naar Marketplace\n"
42	        printf "  \033[32mtask git:cleanup\033[0m  branch opruimen (als al gemerged)\n"
43	        printf "\n"
44	
45	  start:
46	    desc: Start TypeScript watcher (achtergrond)
47	    silent: false
48	    cmds:
49	      - task: _ensure_runtime_dirs
50	      - |
51	        if [ -f .task/watch.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat .task/watch.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then
52	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m TypeScript watcher is al actief (pid=%s)\n" "$(cat .task/watch.pid)"
53	          exit 0
54	        fi
55	        nohup sh -c "{{.DEV_CMD}}" > .task/watch.log 2>&1 &
56	        echo $! > .task/watch.pid
57	        sleep 1
58	        if kill -0 "$(cat .task/watch.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then
59	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m TypeScript watcher gestart (pid=%s)\n" "$(cat .task/watch.pid)"
60	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m logs: task logs\n"
61	        else
62	          printf "\033[31m[ERR]\033[0m watcher kon niet starten — check: task logs\n"
63	          exit 1
64	        fi
65	
66	  stop:
67	    desc: Stop TypeScript watcher
68	    silent: false
69	    cmds:
70	      - |
71	        if [ -f .task/watch.pid ]; then
72	          PID=$(cat .task/watch.pid)
73	          if kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
74	            kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
75	            sleep 1
76	            kill -9 "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
77	          fi
78	          rm -f .task/watch.pid
79	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m TypeScript watcher gestopt\n"
80	        else
81	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m geen actieve watcher gevonden\n"
82	        fi
83	
84	  restart:
85	    desc: Herstart TypeScript watcher
86	    cmds:
87	      - task: stop
88	      - task: start
89	
90	  logs:
91	    desc: Toon watcher output (live)
92	    cmds:
93	      - |
94	        test -f .task/watch.log || touch .task/watch.log
95	        tail -f .task/watch.log
96	
97	  status:
98	    desc: Toon watcher status
99	    silent: false
100	    cmds:
101	      - |
102	        if [ -f .task/watch.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat .task/watch.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then
103	          printf "\033[32m[OK]\033[0m TypeScript watcher actief (pid=%s)\n" "$(cat .task/watch.pid)"
104	          printf "\033[1m[INFO]\033[0m log: .task/watch.log\n"
105	        else
106	          printf "\033[33m[WARN]\033[0m TypeScript watcher niet actief\n"
107	          rm -f .task/watch.pid
108	        fi
109	
110	  _ensure_runtime_dirs:
111	    internal: true
112	    cmds:
113	      - mkdir -p .task
114

content.text: Continuing my deep read. Let me now sample server management, special tools, single-file Python, and check duplicate-vs-divergence patterns.

content.content:
1	version: '3'
2	
3	# Linode Server Beheer - Task Runner
4	# Gebruik: task <command>
5	# Installeer Task: https://taskfile.dev
6	
7	vars:
8	  DASHBOARD_PORT: 35511
9	  DASHBOARD_DIR: dashboard
10	  SERVICE_NAME: dashboard
11	
12	tasks:
13	  # === Dashboard Management ===
14	  start:
15	    desc: Start het dashboard (http://localhost:35511)
16	    silent: true
17	    cmds:
18	      - |
19	        if systemctl --user is-active --quiet {{.SERVICE_NAME}}; then
20	          echo "⚠️  Dashboard draait al op http://localhost:{{.DASHBOARD_PORT}}"
21	        else
22	          # Check en installeer Flask indien nodig (suppress all output)
23	          if ! python3 -c "import flask" 2>/dev/null; then
24	            echo "📦 Installing Flask dependencies..."
25	            pip3 install flask flask-cors --user >/dev/null 2>&1
26	          fi
27	          systemctl --user start {{.SERVICE_NAME}}
28	          sleep 1
29	          if systemctl --user is-active --quiet {{.SERVICE_NAME}}; then
30	            echo "✅ Dashboard gestart op http://localhost:{{.DASHBOARD_PORT}}"
31	            echo "🔧 Live Runner beschikbaar op http://localhost:{{.DASHBOARD_PORT}}/runner"
32	            echo "📊 Open in browser of gebruik: task open"
33	          else
34	            echo "❌ Dashboard kon niet starten. Bekijk logs met: task logs"
35	          fi
36	        fi
37	
38	  stop:
39	    desc: Stop het dashboard
40	    silent: true
41	    cmds:
42	      - |
43	        if systemctl --user is-active --quiet {{.SERVICE_NAME}}; then
44	          systemctl --user stop {{.SERVICE_NAME}}
45	          echo "🛑 Dashboard gestopt"
46	        else
47	          echo "⚠️  Dashboard draait niet"
48	        fi
49	
50	  restart:
51	    desc: Herstart het dashboard
52	    silent: true
53	    cmds:
54	      - systemctl --user restart {{.SERVICE_NAME}}
55	      - |
56	        sleep 1

331	      - echo "  task logs           - Live logs bekijken"
332	      - echo "  task monitor        - Start monitoring"
333	      - echo "  task docs           - Toon documentatie"

335	      - echo ""
336	      - task: start
