1	# taskfiles/core.yml — WireGuard Manager core layer
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  APP_NAME: '{{default "wireguard-manager" .APP_NAME}}'
8	  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "31638" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
9	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
10	  PM2_SERVICE: '{{default "wireguard-manager" .PM2_SERVICE}}'
11	
12	tasks:
13	  help:
14	    desc: Toon core command overzicht
15	    silent: false
16	    cmds:
17	      - |
18	        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
19	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
20	          URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
21	        else
22	          URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
23	        fi
24	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== WIREGUARD MANAGER ===\033[0m\n"
25	        printf "\033[1mapp:\033[0m    %s\n" "{{.APP_NAME}}"
26	        printf "\033[1mruntime:\033[0m PM2 (python3)\n"
27	        printf "\033[1murl:\033[0m    %s\n" "$URL"
28	        printf "\n\033[1;33mCore commands:\033[0m\n"
29	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m    start via PM2\n"
30	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m     stop PM2 service\n"
31	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m  herstart PM2 service\n"
32	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m     volg PM2 logs live\n"
33	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m   PM2 service status\n"
34	        printf "\n\033[1;33mProject commands:\033[0m\n"
35	        printf "  \033[32mtask project:dev\033[0m      start direct via python3 (zonder PM2)\n"
36	        printf "  \033[32mtask project:test\033[0m     draai pytest\n"
37	        printf "  \033[32mtask project:install\033[0m  installeer python dependencies\n"
38	        printf "  \033[32mtask project:users\033[0m    toon WireGuard gebruikerslijst\n"
39	        printf "  \033[32mtask project:add-user\033[0m  gebruiker toevoegen (USER=naam)\n"
40	        printf "\n"
41	
42	  start:
43	    desc: Start WireGuard Manager via PM2
44	    silent: false
45	    cmds:
46	      - task: _ensure_runtime_dirs
47	      - |
48	        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
49	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
50	          URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
51	        else
52	          URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
53	        fi
54	
55	        # Check of PM2 beschikbaar is
56	        if ! command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
57	          printf "\\033[31m[ERR]\\033[0m pm2 niet gevonden — installeer met: npm install -g pm2\\n"
58	          exit 1
59	        fi
60	
61	        # Check of service al draait
62	        if pm2 describe {{.PM2_SERVICE}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
63	          STATUS=$(pm2 describe {{.PM2_SERVICE}} 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'status\s+\K\S+' | head -1)
64	          if [ "$STATUS" = "online" ]; then
65	            printf "\\033[33m[WARN]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} draait al (status: online)\\n"
66	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Gebruik 'task restart' om te herstarten\\n"
67	            printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m url: %s\\n" "$URL"
68	            exit 0
69	          fi
70	          pm2 start {{.PM2_SERVICE}} --update-env 2>/dev/null || \
71	            pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --update-env
72	        else
73	          pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --update-env
74	        fi
75	
76	        sleep 1
77	        printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m {{.APP_NAME}} gestart via PM2\\n"
78	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m url: %s\\n" "$URL"
79	        printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m logs: task logs\\n"
80	
81	  stop:
82	    desc: Stop WireGuard Manager PM2 service
83	    silent: false
84	    cmds:
85	      - |
86	        if ! command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
87	          printf "\\033[31m[ERR]\\033[0m pm2 niet gevonden\\n"
88	          exit 1
89	        fi
90	        if pm2 describe {{.PM2_SERVICE}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
91	          pm2 stop {{.PM2_SERVICE}}
92	          printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} gestopt\\n"
93	        else
94	          printf "\\033[33m[WARN]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} niet gevonden in PM2\\n"
95	        fi
96	
97	  restart:
98	    desc: Herstart WireGuard Manager via PM2
99	    silent: false
100	    cmds:
101	      - |
102	        if ! command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
103	          printf "\\033[31m[ERR]\\033[0m pm2 niet gevonden\\n"
104	          exit 1
105	        fi
106	        if pm2 describe {{.PM2_SERVICE}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
107	          pm2 restart {{.PM2_SERVICE}} --update-env
108	          printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} herstart\\n"
109	        else
110	          printf "\\033[33m[WARN]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} niet gevonden — start nu op...\\n"
111	          pm2 start ecosystem.config.js
112	          printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m {{.APP_NAME}} gestart\\n"
113	        fi
114	
115	  logs:
116	    desc: Volg PM2 logs live
117	    cmds:
118	      - |
119	        if ! command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
120	          printf "\\033[31m[ERR]\\033[0m pm2 niet gevonden\\n"
121	          exit 1
122	        fi
123	        pm2 logs {{.PM2_SERVICE}} --lines 50
124	
125	  status:
126	    desc: Toon PM2 service status
127	    silent: false
128	    cmds:
129	      - |
130	        if ! command -v pm2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
131	          printf "\\033[31m[ERR]\\033[0m pm2 niet gevonden\\n"
132	          exit 1
133	        fi
134	        ONLINE=$(pm2 describe {{.PM2_SERVICE}} 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'online' || true)
135	        if [ "$ONLINE" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then
136	          VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
137	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
138	            URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
139	          else
140	            URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
141	          fi
142	          printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} is online\\n"
143	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m url: %s\\n" "$URL"
144	        else
145	          printf "\\033[33m[WARN]\\033[0m {{.PM2_SERVICE}} is niet actief\\n"
146	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m Start met: task start\\n"
147	        fi
148	        printf "\n"
149	        pm2 list 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Name|{{.PM2_SERVICE}}" || true
150	
151	  _ensure_runtime_dirs:
152	    internal: true
153	    cmds:
154	      - mkdir -p .task
155

1	version: '3'
2	
3	# ==============================================================================
4	# UFW Manager GUI - Modern Task Runner
5	# ==============================================================================
6	# Project: tools_ufw
7	# Owner: brechtparmentier
8	# Stack: Python 3.12 + Web Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS)
9	# Purpose: Interactive UFW firewall management with GUI
10	# ==============================================================================
11	#
12	# Quick Start:
13	#   task --list              Show all available tasks
14	#   task gui:start           Start GUI server in background
15	#   task status              Check service status
16	#   task help                Show detailed help
17	#
18	# Installation:
19	#   macOS:   brew install go-task/tap/go-task
20	#   Linux:   sh -c "$(curl --location https://taskfile.dev/install.sh)" -- -d -b ~/.local/bin
21	#   Windows: choco install go-task
22	#
23	# Documentation: https://taskfile.dev
24	# ==============================================================================
25	
26	vars:
27	  # Project informatie
28	  REPO_OWNER: brechtparmentier
29	  REPO_NAME: tools_ufw
30	  DEFAULT_BRANCH: main
31	  GIT_REMOTE: origin
32	
33	  # Python configuratie
34	  PYTHON: '{{if eq OS "windows"}}python{{else}}python3{{end}}'
35	  VENV_DIR: .venv
36	  VENV_BIN: '{{if eq OS "windows"}}.venv/Scripts{{else}}.venv/bin{{end}}'
37	  VENV_PYTHON: '{{.VENV_BIN}}/python'
38	  VENV_PIP: '{{.VENV_BIN}}/pip'
39	
40	  # Project paths
41	  ROOT_DIR: '{{.PWD}}'
42	  FRONTEND_DIR: frontend
43	  SCRIPTS_DIR: scripts
44	  TESTS_DIR: tests
45	  DOCS_DIR: docs
46	  RUN_DIR: .task
47	  LOGS_DIR: '{{.RUN_DIR}}'
48	
49	  # GUI configuratie
50	  GUI_HOST: '0.0.0.0'
51	  GUI_PORT: '8769'
52	  GUI_VPN_IP: '10.0.0.11'
53	  GUI_SCRIPT: 'ufw-gui-server.py'
54	  GUI_LAUNCHER: '{{.SCRIPTS_DIR}}/ufw-gui-start.py'
55	  GUI_PID: '{{.RUN_DIR}}/ufw-gui.pid'
56	  GUI_LOG: '{{.RUN_DIR}}/ufw-gui.log'
57	  GUI_SUDO: ''
58	
59	  # ANSI kleuren voor output
60	  BLUE: '\033[0;34m'
61	  GREEN: '\033[0;32m'
62	  YELLOW: '\033[1;33m'
63	  RED: '\033[0;31m'
64	  CYAN: '\033[0;36m'
65	  BOLD: '\033[1m'
66	  NC: '\033[0m' # No Color
67	
68	  # Network detection
69	  LOCAL_IP:
70	    sh: hostname -I 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || echo "127.0.0.1"
71	
72	tasks:
73	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
74	  # 📚 HELP & INFORMATIE
75	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
76	
77	  default:
78	    desc: '📖 Toon uitgebreide help (standaard)'
79	    silent: true
80	    cmds:
81	      - task: help
82	
83	  help:
84	    desc: '📖 Toon uitgebreide help met voorbeelden'
85	    silent: true
86	    cmds:
87	      - |
88	        cat << 'EOF'
89	        ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
90	        ║              UFW MANAGER GUI - TASK COMMANDS                         ║
91	        ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
92	
93	        🚀 MEEST GEBRUIKTE COMMANDO'S
94	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
95	          task gui:start          Start GUI server in background
96	          task gui:stop           Stop GUI server
97	          task gui:restart        Restart GUI server
98	          task status             Check service status
99	          task gui:logs           Toon server logs
100	
101	        📦 SETUP & INSTALLATIE
102	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
103	          task setup              Complete first-time setup
104	          task install            Install Python dependencies
105	          task doctor             System health check
106	
107	        🔧 DEVELOPMENT
108	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
109	          task gui:run            Run GUI in foreground (debug)
110	          task test               Run tests
111	          task lint               Lint Python code
112	          task format             Format Python code
113	
114	        📊 MONITORING & INFO
115	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
116	          task info               Show project information
117	          task gui:logs           Tail GUI logs
118	          task gui:status         Show GUI status
119	
120	        🧹 MAINTENANCE
121	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
122	          task clean              Clean generated files
123	          task clean:logs         Clean log files
124	          task clean:all          Deep clean (includes venv)
125	
126	        ⚡ SHORTCUTS
127	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
128	          task s                  Alias: start
129	          task x                  Alias: stop
130	          task r                  Alias: restart
131	          task st                 Alias: status
132	          task l                  Alias: logs
133	
134	        💡 SUDO MODE (voor live UFW schrijven)
135	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
136	          task gui:start GUI_SUDO=sudo     Start met sudo rechten
137	          task gui:run GUI_SUDO=sudo       Run foreground met sudo
138	
139	        🌐 ACCESS URLs
140	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
141	          Local:  http://127.0.0.1:{{.GUI_PORT}}/
142	          VPN:    http://{{.GUI_VPN_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/
143	          LAN:    http://{{.LOCAL_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/
144	
145	        ℹ️  TIPS
146	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
147	          • Gebruik 'task --list' voor complete lijst
148	          • GUI draait zonder sudo in read-only mode
149	          • Met sudo kun je UFW regels live aanpassen
150	          • Logs staan in {{.LOGS_DIR}}/ufw-gui.log
151	
152	        EOF
153	
154	  info:
155	    desc: 'ℹ️  Show project information'
156	    silent: true
157	    cmds:
158	      - |
159	        printf "{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}📋 Project Information{{.NC}}\n\n"
160	        printf "  Name:         {{.REPO_NAME}}\n"
161	        printf "  Owner:        {{.REPO_OWNER}}\n"
162	        printf "  Branch:       $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')\n"
163	        printf "  Commit:       $(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')\n"
164	        printf "  Python:       $({{.PYTHON}} --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found')\n"
165	        printf "\n{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}📁 Directories{{.NC}}\n"
166	        printf "  Root:         {{.ROOT_DIR}}\n"
167	        printf "  Frontend:     {{.FRONTEND_DIR}}\n"
168	        printf "  Scripts:      {{.SCRIPTS_DIR}}\n"
169	        printf "  Tests:        {{.TESTS_DIR}}\n"
170	        printf "  Logs:         {{.LOGS_DIR}}\n"
171	        printf "  Venv:         {{.VENV_DIR}}\n"
172	        printf "\n{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}🌐 Network{{.NC}}\n"
173	        printf "  GUI Port:     {{.GUI_PORT}}\n"
174	        printf "  GUI Host:     {{.GUI_HOST}}\n"
175	        printf "  VPN IP:       {{.GUI_VPN_IP}}\n"
176	        printf "  Local IP:     {{.LOCAL_IP}}\n"
177	        printf "\n{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}🔗 Access URLs{{.NC}}\n"
178	        printf "  Local:        http://127.0.0.1:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
179	        printf "  VPN:          http://{{.GUI_VPN_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
180	        printf "  LAN:          http://{{.LOCAL_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
181	
182	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
183	  # 📦 SETUP & INSTALLATIE
184	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
185	
186	  setup:
187	    desc: '🔧 Complete first-time setup'
188	    cmds:
189	      - task: setup:venv
190	      - task: install
191	      - task: setup:dirs
192	      - task: doctor
193	      - |
194	        printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Setup complete!{{.NC}}\n"
195	        printf "{{.CYAN}}💡 Start the GUI with: task gui:start{{.NC}}\n"
196	
197	  setup:venv:
198	    desc: '🐍 Create Python virtual environment'
199	    internal: true
200	    preconditions:
201	      - sh: command -v {{.PYTHON}} >/dev/null 2>&1
202	        msg: '❌ Python 3 is required but not installed'
203	    cmds:
204	      - |
205	        if [ ! -d "{{.VENV_DIR}}" ]; then
206	          printf "{{.BLUE}}🐍 Creating virtual environment...{{.NC}}\n"
207	          {{.PYTHON}} -m venv {{.VENV_DIR}}
208	          {{.VENV_PIP}} install --upgrade pip wheel setuptools
209	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Virtual environment created{{.NC}}\n"
210	        else
211	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  Virtual environment already exists{{.NC}}\n"
212	        fi
213	    status:
214	      - test -d {{.VENV_DIR}}
215	
216	  setup:dirs:
217	    desc: '📁 Create required directories'
218	    internal: true
219	    cmds:
220	      - mkdir -p {{.RUN_DIR}}
221	      - mkdir -p {{.LOGS_DIR}}
222	      - |
223	        printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Directories created{{.NC}}\n"
224	
225	  install:
226	    desc: '📦 Install Python dependencies'
227	    deps: [setup:venv]
228	    cmds:
229	      - |
230	        printf "{{.BLUE}}📦 Installing dependencies...{{.NC}}\n"
231	        if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
232	          {{.VENV_PIP}} install -r requirements.txt
233	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Dependencies installed{{.NC}}\n"
234	        else
235	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  No requirements.txt found{{.NC}}\n"
236	        fi
237	
238	  doctor:
239	    desc: '🏥 System health check - verify all tools'
240	    silent: true
241	    cmds:
242	      - |
243	        printf "{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}🏥 System Health Check{{.NC}}\n\n"
244	        HEALTHY=true
245	
246	        # Check Python
247	        if command -v {{.PYTHON}} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
248	          VERSION=$({{.PYTHON}} --version 2>&1)
249	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Python installed: $VERSION{{.NC}}\n"
250	        else
251	          printf "{{.RED}}❌ Python not found{{.NC}}\n"
252	          HEALTHY=false
253	        fi
254	
255	        # Check venv
256	        if [ -d "{{.VENV_DIR}}" ]; then
257	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Virtual environment exists{{.NC}}\n"
258	        else
259	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  Virtual environment not found (run: task setup){{.NC}}\n"
260	          HEALTHY=false
261	        fi
262	
263	        # Check GUI script
264	        if [ -f "{{.GUI_SCRIPT}}" ]; then
265	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ GUI script found{{.NC}}\n"
266	        else
267	          printf "{{.RED}}❌ GUI script not found: {{.GUI_SCRIPT}}{{.NC}}\n"
268	          HEALTHY=false
269	        fi
270	
271	        # Check frontend
272	        if [ -d "{{.FRONTEND_DIR}}" ]; then
273	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Frontend directory exists{{.NC}}\n"
274	        else
275	          printf "{{.RED}}❌ Frontend directory not found{{.NC}}\n"
276	          HEALTHY=false
277	        fi
278	
279	        # Check UFW
280	        if command -v ufw >/dev/null 2>&1; then
281	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ UFW installed{{.NC}}\n"
282	        else
283	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  UFW not found (firewall tool){{.NC}}\n"
284	        fi
285	
286	        printf "\n"
287	        if [ "$HEALTHY" = true ]; then
288	          printf "{{.GREEN}}{{.BOLD}}✅ System is healthy!{{.NC}}\n"
289	        else
290	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}{{.BOLD}}⚠️  Some issues detected{{.NC}}\n"
291	        fi
292	
293	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
294	  # 🚀 SERVICE MANAGEMENT
295	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
296	
297	  gui:run:
298	    desc: '🔧 Run UFW GUI in foreground (debug mode)'
299	    silent: true
300	    preconditions:
301	      - sh: test -f {{.GUI_SCRIPT}}
302	        msg: '❌ GUI script not found: {{.GUI_SCRIPT}}'
303	    cmds:
304	      - |
305	        printf "{{.BLUE}}🚀 Starting UFW GUI in foreground...{{.NC}}\n"
306	        printf "{{.CYAN}}📍 Access at: http://{{.GUI_HOST}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/{{.NC}}\n"
307	        printf "{{.YELLOW}}💡 Press Ctrl+C to stop{{.NC}}\n\n"
308	        {{.GUI_SUDO}} env UFW_GUI_HOST={{.GUI_HOST}} UFW_GUI_PORT={{.GUI_PORT}} \
309	          UFW_GUI_VPN_IP={{.GUI_VPN_IP}} {{.PYTHON}} {{.GUI_SCRIPT}}
310	
311	  gui:start:
312	    desc: '🚀 Start UFW GUI in background'
313	    silent: true
314	    preconditions:
315	      - sh: test -f {{.GUI_LAUNCHER}}
316	        msg: '❌ GUI launcher not found: {{.GUI_LAUNCHER}}'
317	    cmds:
318	      - mkdir -p {{.RUN_DIR}}
319	      - |
320	        if [ -f "{{.GUI_PID}}" ] && {{.GUI_SUDO}} kill -0 "$(cat {{.GUI_PID}})" 2>/dev/null; then
321	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  UFW GUI already running (pid $(cat {{.GUI_PID}})){{.NC}}\n"
322	          printf "{{.CYAN}}🌐 VPN URL: http://{{.GUI_VPN_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/{{.NC}}\n"
323	          exit 0
324	        fi
325	
326	        printf "{{.BLUE}}🚀 Starting UFW GUI...{{.NC}}\n"
327	        {{.GUI_SUDO}} env UFW_GUI_HOST={{.GUI_HOST}} UFW_GUI_PORT={{.GUI_PORT}} \
328	          UFW_GUI_VPN_IP={{.GUI_VPN_IP}} UFW_GUI_SCRIPT={{.GUI_SCRIPT}} \
329	          UFW_GUI_PID={{.GUI_PID}} UFW_GUI_LOG={{.GUI_LOG}} \
330	          {{.PYTHON}} {{.GUI_LAUNCHER}}
331	
332	        sleep 0.5
333	        if [ -f "{{.GUI_PID}}" ]; then
334	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ UFW GUI started (pid $(cat {{.GUI_PID}})){{.NC}}\n"
335	          printf "{{.CYAN}}🌐 Local: http://127.0.0.1:{{.GUI_PORT}}/{{.NC}}\n"
336	          printf "{{.CYAN}}🌐 VPN:   http://{{.GUI_VPN_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/{{.NC}}\n"
337	          printf "{{.CYAN}}🌐 LAN:   http://{{.LOCAL_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/{{.NC}}\n"
338	        else
339	          printf "{{.RED}}❌ Failed to start GUI{{.NC}}\n"
340	          exit 1
341	        fi
342	
343	  gui:stop:
344	    desc: '🛑 Stop UFW GUI'
345	    silent: true
346	    cmds:
347	      - |
348	        if [ ! -f "{{.GUI_PID}}" ]; then
349	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  UFW GUI not running (pid file missing){{.NC}}\n"
350	          exit 0
351	        fi
352	
353	        pid="$(cat {{.GUI_PID}})"
354	        case "$pid" in
355	          ''|*[!0-9]*)
356	            printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  UFW GUI not running (invalid pid file){{.NC}}\n"
357	            {{.GUI_SUDO}} rm -f "{{.GUI_PID}}"
358	            exit 0
359	            ;;
360	        esac
361	
362	        if {{.GUI_SUDO}} kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then
363	          printf "{{.BLUE}}🛑 Stopping UFW GUI (pid $pid)...{{.NC}}\n"
364	          {{.GUI_SUDO}} kill "$pid"
365	          sleep 0.4
366	          if {{.GUI_SUDO}} kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then
367	            {{.GUI_SUDO}} kill -9 "$pid"
368	          fi
369	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ UFW GUI stopped{{.NC}}\n"
370	        else
371	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  Process not running{{.NC}}\n"
372	        fi
373	
374	        {{.GUI_SUDO}} rm -f "{{.GUI_PID}}"
375	
376	  gui:restart:
377	    desc: '🔄 Restart UFW GUI'
378	    cmds:
379	      - task: gui:stop
380	      - sleep 1
381	      - task: gui:start
382	
383	  gui:status:
384	    desc: '📊 Show GUI service status'
385	    silent: true
386	    cmds:
387	      - |
388	        printf "{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}📊 UFW GUI Status{{.NC}}\n\n"
389	
390	        if [ -f "{{.GUI_PID}}" ]; then
391	          pid="$(cat {{.GUI_PID}})"
392	          case "$pid" in
393	            ''|*[!0-9]*)
394	              printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  Invalid PID file{{.NC}}\n"
395	              exit 0
396	              ;;
397	          esac
398	          
399	          if {{.GUI_SUDO}} kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then
400	            printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ GUI running (PID: $pid){{.NC}}\n"
401	            printf "\n{{.BLUE}}🌐 Access URLs:{{.NC}}\n"
402	            printf "  Local: http://127.0.0.1:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
403	            printf "  VPN:   http://{{.GUI_VPN_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
404	            printf "  LAN:   http://{{.LOCAL_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
405	            
406	            # Check if server responds
407	            if curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:{{.GUI_PORT}} 2>/dev/null | grep -q "200"; then
408	              printf "\n{{.GREEN}}✅ Server responding{{.NC}}\n"
409	            fi
410	          else
411	            printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  Process not running (stale PID file){{.NC}}\n"
412	          fi
413	        else
414	          printf "{{.RED}}❌ GUI not running{{.NC}}\n"
415	          printf "{{.CYAN}}💡 Start with: task gui:start{{.NC}}\n"
416	        fi
417	
418	  gui:logs:
419	    desc: '📋 Tail UFW GUI log'
420	    silent: true
421	    cmds:
422	      - mkdir -p {{.RUN_DIR}}
423	      - |
424	        if [ ! -f "{{.GUI_LOG}}" ]; then
425	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  No log file yet: {{.GUI_LOG}}{{.NC}}\n"
426	          printf "{{.CYAN}}💡 Start GUI with: task gui:start{{.NC}}\n"
427	          exit 0
428	        fi
429	        printf "{{.BLUE}}📋 Tailing GUI log (Ctrl+C to stop)...{{.NC}}\n\n"
430	        {{.GUI_SUDO}} tail -n 50 -f "{{.GUI_LOG}}"
431	
432	  gui:test:
433	    desc: '🧪 Run GUI launcher integration test'
434	    cmds:
435	      - |
436	        printf "{{.BLUE}}🧪 Running GUI launcher tests...{{.NC}}\n"
437	        {{.PYTHON}} {{.TESTS_DIR}}/test_gui_launcher.py
438	        printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Tests complete{{.NC}}\n"
439	
440	  status:
441	    desc: '📊 Show complete system status'
442	    silent: true
443	    cmds:
444	      - task: gui:status
445	      - |
446	        printf "\n{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}🔧 System Info{{.NC}}\n"
447	        printf "  Python:    $({{.PYTHON}} --version 2>&1)\n"
448	        printf "  Task:      $(task --version 2>&1 || echo 'unknown')\n"
449	        printf "  UFW:       $(ufw version 2>&1 | head -1 || echo 'not found')\n"
450	
451	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
452	  # 🔧 DEVELOPMENT
453	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
454	
455	  test:
456	    desc: '🧪 Run all tests'
457	    cmds:
458	      - |
459	        printf "{{.BLUE}}🧪 Running tests...{{.NC}}\n"
460	        if [ -f "{{.VENV_PYTHON}}" ]; then
461	          {{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m pytest {{.TESTS_DIR}}/ -v
462	        else
463	          {{.PYTHON}} -m pytest {{.TESTS_DIR}}/ -v
464	        fi
465	        printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Tests complete{{.NC}}\n"
466	
467	  test:watch:
468	    desc: '🧪 Run tests in watch mode'
469	    cmds:
470	      - |
471	        printf "{{.BLUE}}🧪 Running tests in watch mode...{{.NC}}\n"
472	        if [ -f "{{.VENV_PYTHON}}" ]; then
473	          {{.VENV_PYTHON}} -m pytest {{.TESTS_DIR}}/ -v --watch
474	        else
475	          {{.PYTHON}} -m pytest {{.TESTS_DIR}}/ -v --watch
476	        fi
477	
478	  lint:
479	    desc: '🔍 Lint Python code'
480	    cmds:
481	      - |
482	        printf "{{.BLUE}}🔍 Linting Python code...{{.NC}}\n"
483	        PYTHON_BIN={{if .VENV_PYTHON}}{{.VENV_PYTHON}}{{else}}{{.PYTHON}}{{end}}
484	
485	        if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 || $PYTHON_BIN -m ruff --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
486	          $PYTHON_BIN -m ruff check . || true
487	        elif command -v pylint >/dev/null 2>&1; then
488	          pylint *.py {{.SCRIPTS_DIR}}/*.py || true
489	        elif command -v flake8 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
490	          flake8 . || true
491	        else
492	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  No linter found (install ruff, pylint, or flake8){{.NC}}\n"
493	        fi
494	        printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Linting complete{{.NC}}\n"
495	
496	  format:
497	    desc: '✨ Format Python code'
498	    cmds:
499	      - |
500	        printf "{{.BLUE}}✨ Formatting Python code...{{.NC}}\n"
501	        PYTHON_BIN={{if .VENV_PYTHON}}{{.VENV_PYTHON}}{{else}}{{.PYTHON}}{{end}}
502	
503	        if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1 || $PYTHON_BIN -m black --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
504	          $PYTHON_BIN -m black .
505	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Code formatted with black{{.NC}}\n"
506	        elif command -v autopep8 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
507	          autopep8 --in-place --recursive .
508	          printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Code formatted with autopep8{{.NC}}\n"
509	        else
510	          printf "{{.YELLOW}}⚠️  No formatter found (install black or autopep8){{.NC}}\n"
511	        fi
512	
513	  dev:
514	    desc: '🔧 Start development mode (foreground with auto-reload)'
515	    cmds:

519	  # 🧹 MAINTENANCE & CLEANUP

521

530	        rm -rf .ruff_cache

534	
535	  clean:logs:

540	        rm -f {{.GUI_LOG}}
541	        rm -f {{.GUI_PID}}
542	        printf "{{.GREEN}}✅ Log files cleaned{{.NC}}\n"
543	
544	  clean:all:

555

557	  # 📖 HELP TASKS (backwards compatibility)
558	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
559	
560	  gui:help:
561	    desc: '📖 Show GUI run commands'
562	    silent: true
563	    cmds:
564	      - |
565	        printf "{{.BLUE}}{{.BOLD}}📖 UFW GUI Run Commands{{.NC}}\n\n"
566	        printf "{{.CYAN}}Basic:{{.NC}}\n"

569	        printf "\n{{.CYAN}}With sudo (live writes):{{.NC}}\n"

574	        printf "\n{{.CYAN}}Access:{{.NC}}\n"
575	        printf "  Local: http://127.0.0.1:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
576	        printf "  VPN:   http://{{.GUI_VPN_IP}}:{{.GUI_PORT}}/\n"
577

598	  # ⚡ SHORTCUTS

8	  DEV_CMD: '{{default "pnpm run dev" .DEV_CMD}}'
9	  DOCKER_SERVICE: '{{default "webportaal" .DOCKER_SERVICE}}'
10	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
11	
12	tasks:
13	  help:
14	    desc: Show core command help
15	    cmds:
16	      - |
17	        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '10\.0\.0\.[0-9]+' | head -1 || echo "")}"
18	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
19	          URL="http://${VPN_IP}:${FRONTEND_PORT}"
20	        else
21	          URL="http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT}"
22	        fi
23	        printf "\n\\033[1;36m=== TASK CORE ===\\033[0m\n"
24	        printf "\\033[1mapp:\\033[0m    %s\n" "${APP_NAME}"
25	        printf "\\033[1mmode:\\033[0m   %s\n" "$( [ \"${USE_DOCKER}\" = \"1\" ] && echo docker || echo local )"
26	        printf "\\033[1murl:\\033[0m    %s\n" "$URL"
27	        printf "\n\\033[1;33mCommands:\\033[0m\n"
28	        printf "  \\033[32mtask start\\033[0m    start app\n"
29	        printf "  \\033[32mtask stop\\033[0m     stop app\n"
30	        printf "  \\033[32mtask restart\\033[0m  restart app\n"
31	        printf "  \\033[32mtask logs\\033[0m     show logs\n"
32	        printf "  \\033[32mtask status\\033[0m   service status\n"
33	
34	        if [ -f "taskfiles/project.yml" ]; then
35	          PROJECT_TASKS=$(task --list-all 2>/dev/null | grep "^project:" | sed 's/^project://' | awk '{printf "  \\033[32mtask %s\\033[0m  %s\\n", $1, substr($0, index($0,$2))}')
36	          if [ -n "$PROJECT_TASKS" ]; then
37	            printf "\n"
38	            printf "\\033[1;33mProject commands:\\033[0m\n"
39	            echo "$PROJECT_TASKS"
40	          fi
41	        fi
42	
43	  start:
44	    desc: Start app (docker or local)
45	    cmds:
46	      - task: _ensure_runtime_dirs
47	      - |
48	        if [ "${USE_DOCKER}" = "1" ]; then
49	          docker compose up -d
50	        else
51	          nohup sh -c "${DEV_CMD}" > .task/dev.log 2>&1 &
52	          echo $! > .task/dev.pid
53	
54	          VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '10\.0\.0\.[0-9]+' | head -1 || echo "")}"
55	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
56	            URL="http://${VPN_IP}:${FRONTEND_PORT}"
57	          else
58	            URL="http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT}"
59	          fi
60	
61	          printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m local process started (pid=%s)\n" "$(cat .task/dev.pid)"
62	          printf "\\033[1m[INFO]\\033[0m url: %s\n" "$URL"
63	        fi
64	
65	  stop:
66	    desc: Stop app (docker or local)
67	    cmds:
68	      - |
69	        if [ "${USE_DOCKER}" = "1" ]; then
70	          docker compose down
71	        else
72	          if [ -f .task/dev.pid ]; then
73	            kill "$(cat .task/dev.pid)" 2>/dev/null || true
74	            rm -f .task/dev.pid
75	            printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m local process stopped\n"
76	          else
77	            printf "\\033[33m[WARN]\\033[0m no pid file found\n"
78	          fi
79	        fi
80	
81	  restart:
82	    desc: Restart app
83	    cmds:
84	      - task: stop
85	      - task: start
86	
87	  logs:
88	    desc: Follow logs (docker or local)
89	    cmds:
90	      - |
91	        if [ "${USE_DOCKER}" = "1" ]; then
92	          if [ -n "${DOCKER_SERVICE}" ]; then
93	            docker compose logs -f "${DOCKER_SERVICE}"
94	          else
95	            docker compose logs -f
96	          fi
97	        else
98	          test -f .task/dev.log || touch .task/dev.log
99	          tail -f .task/dev.log
100	        fi
101	
102	  status:
103	    desc: Show service status
104	    cmds:
105	      - |
106	        if [ "${USE_DOCKER}" = "1" ]; then
107	          docker compose ps
108	        else
109	          if [ -f .task/dev.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat .task/dev.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then
110	            printf "\\033[32m[OK]\\033[0m running (pid=%s)\n" "$(cat .task/dev.pid)"
111	          else
112	            printf "\\033[33m[WARN]\\033[0m not running\n"
113	          fi
114	        fi
115	
116	  _ensure_runtime_dirs:
117	    internal: true
118	    cmds:
119	      - mkdir -p .task
120

1	version: '3'
2	
3	# Enterprise-grade configuration
4	set: [errexit, pipefail, nounset]
5	shopt: [globstar]
6	
7	# Load environment variables from .env if present
8	dotenv: ['.env', '{{.HOME}}/.config/smart-search/.env']
9	
10	vars:
11	  # Installation paths
12	  INSTALL_DIR: '{{.HOME}}/.local/bin'
13	  CONFIG_DIR: '{{.HOME}}/.config/smart-search'
14	  SHARE_DIR: '{{.HOME}}/.local/share/smart-search'
15	
16	  # Shell configuration
17	  BASHRC: '{{.HOME}}/.bashrc'
18	  SEARCH_CONFIG: '{{.HOME}}/.search_config'
19	
20	  # Repository context (ROOT_DIR is stable across includes, TASKFILE_DIR is not)
21	  REPO_DIR: '{{.ROOT_DIR}}'
22	  PROJECT_NAME:
23	    sh: basename "{{.ROOT_DIR}}"
24	
25	  # Web service files
26	  WEB_PID: '{{.CONFIG_DIR}}/search-web.pid'
27	  WEB_LOG: '{{.CONFIG_DIR}}/search-web.log'
28	  WEB_INFO: '{{.CONFIG_DIR}}/search-web.info'
29	
30	  # VPN defaults (override via .env or environment)
31	  WEB_VPN_CIDR: '{{.WEB_VPN_CIDR | default "10.0.0.0/24"}}'
32	  WEB_CALCPORT_OFFSET: '{{.WEB_CALCPORT_OFFSET | default "0"}}'
33	
34	includes:
35	  config:
36	    taskfile: ./.taskfiles/Taskfile.config.yml
37	    optional: false
38	  deps:
39	    taskfile: ./.taskfiles/Taskfile.deps.yml
40	    optional: false
41	  tools:
42	    taskfile: ./.taskfiles/Taskfile.tools.yml
43	    optional: false
44	  web:
45	    taskfile: ./.taskfiles/Taskfile.web.yml
46	    optional: false
47	  maint:
48	    taskfile: ./.taskfiles/Taskfile.maint.yml
49	    optional: false
50	  dev:
51	    taskfile: ./.taskfiles/Taskfile.dev.yml
52	    optional: false
53	
54	tasks:
55	  default:
56	    desc: Toon alle beschikbare taken
57	    silent: true
58	    cmds:
59	      - task --list-all
60	
61	  help:
62	    desc: Help & tips
63	    summary: |
64	      Smart Search Taskfile - Enterprise Edition
65	
66	      Dit is een modulaire Taskfile configuratie voor het Smart Search project.
67	      Alle taken zijn gegroepeerd in namespaces voor betere organisatie.
68	
69	      NAMESPACES:
70	        config:*   - Configuratie management (bashrc, backup, restore)
71	        deps:*     - Dependency checking en validatie
72	        tools:*    - Tool synchronisatie (calcport, vscode-open)
73	        web:*      - Web interface management (start, stop, status)
74	        maint:*    - Onderhoud (cleanup, permissions)
75	        dev:*      - Development tools (test, version, ssh)
76	
77	      ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES:
78	        WEB_VPN_CIDR         - VPN network (default: 10.0.0.0/24)
79	        WEB_HOST             - Override auto-detected VPN IP
80	        WEB_PORT             - Override calcport-computed port
81	        WEB_CALCPORT_OFFSET  - Port offset for calcport (default: 0)
82	
83	      CONFIGURATIE:
84	        Plaats een .env bestand in de project root of in ~/.config/smart-search/
85	        voor persistente configuratie.
86	
87	      VOORBEELDEN:
88	        task deps:check          # Check dependencies
89	        task web:start           # Start web interface
90	        task dev:setup           # Complete development setup
91	        task config:backup-config  # Backup current config
92	    silent: true
93	    cmds:
94	      - |
95	        echo "Smart Search Taskfile - Enterprise Edition"
96	        echo ""
97	        echo "Gebruik:"
98	        echo "  task --list              # alle taken"
99	        echo "  task --list-all          # inclusief interne taken"
100	        echo "  task --summary <taak>    # detail per taak"
101	        echo ""
102	        echo "Namespaces:"
103	        echo "  config:*  deps:*  tools:*  web:*  maint:*  dev:*"
104	        echo ""
105	        echo "Quick start:"
106	        echo "  task dev:setup           # volledige setup"
107	        echo "  task web:start           # start web interface"
108	        echo ""
109	        echo "Meer info: task --summary help"
110	
111	  # Quick aliases for common operations
112	  install:
113	    desc: Alias voor installatie (gebruikt install.sh)
114	    summary: |
115	      Voert het standaard installatie script uit.
116	
117	      Dit script:
118	        - Installeert alle binaries naar ~/.local/bin
119	        - Configureert search_config
120	        - Updateert bashrc indien nodig
121	    cmds:
122	      - ./install.sh
123	
124	  update:
125	    desc: Alias voor update (gebruikt update.sh)
126	    cmds:
127	      - ./update.sh
128	
129	  uninstall:
130	    desc: Alias voor verwijdering (gebruikt uninstall.sh)
131	    cmds:
132	      - ./uninstall.sh
133	
134	  # Composite tasks
135	  quick-start:
136	    desc: Snelle setup voor nieuwe gebruikers
137	    summary: |
138	      Voert alle stappen uit voor een nieuwe installatie:
139	        1. Check dependencies
140	        2. Valideer scripts
141	        3. Run install
142	        4. Start web interface
143	    cmds:
144	      - task: deps:check
145	      - task: deps:validate
146	      - task: install
147	      - echo ""
148	      - echo "Klaar! Run 'source ~/.bashrc' en daarna 'task web:start'"
149	
150	  # ADDED 2026-04-10: 'task full-update' werd gedocumenteerd in ss-help en CHANGELOG maar bestond
151	  # niet in de Taskfile. Toegevoegd als composite task zodat de gedocumenteerde workflow werkt.
152	  # Volgorde: backup eerst (veiligheid), dan check, update, sync tools, health-check ter verificatie.
153	  # Niet verwijderen zonder ook search_config (ss-help sectie MAINTENANCE) bij te werken.
154	  full-update:
155	    desc: Volledige update met alle checks en syncs
156	    summary: |
157	      Complete update workflow:
158	        1. Backup huidige configuratie
159	        2. Check dependencies
160	        3. Voer update uit (update.sh)
161	        4. Sync companion tools (calcport, vscode-open)
162	        5. Health check ter verificatie
163	    cmds:
164	      - task: config:backup-config
165	      - task: deps:check
166	      - task: update
167	      - task: tools:sync
168	      - task: maint:health-check
169	
170	  ci:
171	    desc: CI/CD pipeline (check + validate + test)
172	    summary: |
173	      Voert alle checks uit die in een CI pipeline zouden draaien:
174	        1. Dependency check
175	        2. Script validation
176	        3. Version validation
177	        4. Full test suite
178	    cmds:
179	      - task: deps:check
180	      - task: deps:validate
181	      - task: dev:validate-version
182	      - task: dev:test
183

1	version: '3'
2	
3	# ==============================================================================
4	# Agenda Extractor - Modern Task Runner
5	# ==============================================================================
6	# Project: python_questiAgendaTool
7	# Owner: brechtparmentier
8	# Stack: Python 3.10+ FastAPI + Google Sheets API
9	# Package Managers: uv (Python)
10	# ==============================================================================
11	#
12	# Quick Start:
13	#   task --list              Show all available tasks
14	#   task start               Start web server
15	#   task status              Check service status
16	#   task help                Show detailed help
17	#
18	# Installation:
19	#   macOS:   brew install go-task/tap/go-task
20	#   Linux:   sh -c "$(curl --location https://taskfile.dev/install.sh)" -- -d -b ~/.local/bin
21	#   Windows: choco install go-task
22	#
23	# Documentation: https://taskfile.dev
24	# ==============================================================================
25	
26	vars:
27	  # Project informatie
28	  REPO_OWNER: brechtparmentier
29	  REPO_NAME: python_questiAgendaTool
30	  DEFAULT_BRANCH: main
31	  GIT_REMOTE: origin
32	
33	  # Python configuratie
34	  PYTHON: '{{if eq OS "windows"}}python{{else}}python3{{end}}'
35	  VENV_DIR: .venv
36	  VENV_BIN: '{{if eq OS "windows"}}.venv/Scripts{{else}}.venv/bin{{end}}'
37	  VENV_PYTHON: '{{.VENV_BIN}}/python'
38	  VENV_PIP: '{{.VENV_BIN}}/pip'
39	
40	  # uv package manager
41	  UV: uv
42	
43	  # Project paths
44	  ROOT_DIR: '{{.PWD}}'
45	  SRC_DIR: src/agenda_extractor
46	  DATA_DIR: data
47	  LOGS_DIR: logs
48	  CREDENTIALS_DIR: credentials
49	
50	  # Port configuratie
51	  WEB_PORT: 8123
52	  WEB_HOST: 0.0.0.0
53	  PID_FILE: .web.pid
54	  LOG_FILE: .web.log
55	
56	  # ANSI kleuren voor output
57	  BLUE: '\033[0;34m'
58	  GREEN: '\033[0;32m'
59	  YELLOW: '\033[1;33m'
60	  RED: '\033[0;31m'
61	  CYAN: '\033[0;36m'
62	  MAGENTA: '\033[0;35m'
63	  NC: '\033[0m'
64	
65	  # Network detection
66	  LOCAL_IP:
67	    sh: hostname -I 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || echo "127.0.0.1"
68	  VPN_IP:
69	    sh: ip -4 addr show 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)10\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+' | head -1 || echo ""
70	
71	tasks:
72	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
73	  # 📚 HELP & INFORMATIE
74	  # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
75	
76	  default:
77	    desc: "📖 Toon uitgebreide help (standaard)"
78	    silent: true
79	    cmds:
80	      - task help
81	
82	  help:
83	    desc: "📖 Toon uitgebreide help met voorbeelden"
84	    silent: true
85	    cmds:
86	      - |
87	        cat << 'EOF'
88	        ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
89	        ║           AGENDA EXTRACTOR - TASK COMMANDS                           ║
90	        ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
91	
92	        🚀 MEEST GEBRUIKTE COMMANDO'S
93	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
94	          task start              Start web server (foreground)
95	          task start-bg           Start web server (background)
96	          task stop               Stop web server
97	          task restart            Restart web server
98	          task status             Check service status
99	          task logs               Toon server logs
100	
101	        📦 SETUP & INSTALLATIE
102	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
103	          task setup              Complete first-time setup (venv + deps)
104	          task install            Install dependencies only
105	          task dev                Reinstall editable after changes
106	
107	        🔧 DEVELOPMENT
108	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
109	          task lint               Run ruff lints
110	          task format             Format code with ruff
111	          task test               Run pytest tests
112	          task run                Run CLI extractor
113	          task run-output         Run CLI and save to output.json
114	
115	        🗄️  DATABASE
116	        ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
117	          task db-upgrade         Apply pending migrations
118	          task db-current         Show current migration
119	          task db-history         Show migration history
120	          task db-backup          Create database backup

1	version: "3"

3	silent: true

5	dotenv: [".env"]

7	vars:
8	  # Leest profiel uit .clasp.profile (bijv. "GKOK") en construeert het pad naar

10	  CLASP_AUTH:

24	
25	  pull:
26	    desc: "Download code van Apps Script"
27	    cmds:
28	      - clasp pull --auth {{.CLASP_AUTH}}
29	
30	  open:
31	    desc: "Open Apps Script in browser"
32	    cmds:
33	      - clasp open --auth {{.CLASP_AUTH}}
34	
35	  status:
36	    desc: "Toon te pushen bestanden"
37	    cmds:
38	      - clasp status --auth {{.CLASP_AUTH}}
39	
40	  logs:
41	    desc: "Toon recente Apps Script logs"
42	    cmds:
43	      - clasp logs --auth {{.CLASP_AUTH}}
44	
45	  # ── Project setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
46	
47	  setup:new:
48	    desc: "Nieuw Google Sheet project aanmaken en koppelen (interactief)"
49	    interactive: true
50	    cmds:
51	      - bash scripts/setup_project.sh --new
52	
53	  setup:link:
54	    desc: "Bestaand Google Sheet + Apps Script koppelen (interactief)"
55	    interactive: true
56	    cmds:
57	      - bash scripts/setup_project.sh --link
58	
59	  # ── Kwaliteitscontrole ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
60	
61	  check:
62	    desc: "Controleer op dubbele globale variabelen/functies"
63	    cmds:
64	      - bash scripts/find_duplicate_globals.sh .

1	# taskfiles/core.yml — generic core layer
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  APP_NAME: '{{default "repo-workspace" .APP_NAME}}'
8	  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "28862" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
9	  USE_DOCKER: '{{default "0" .USE_DOCKER}}'
10	  DEV_CMD: '{{default "pnpm run dev" .DEV_CMD}}'
11	  SKIP_PNPM_INSTALL: '{{default "0" .SKIP_PNPM_INSTALL}}'
12	  CLEAN_NEXT_CACHE_ON_START: '{{default "1" .CLEAN_NEXT_CACHE_ON_START}}'
13	  DOCKER_SERVICE: '{{default "" .DOCKER_SERVICE}}'
14	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
15	  START_TIMEOUT: '{{default "90" .START_TIMEOUT}}'
16	  STOP_TIMEOUT: '{{default "15" .STOP_TIMEOUT}}'
17	  SERVICE_PORTS: '{{default "dashboard:28862 browser:28863 manager:28864 summary:28865 clasp:28866" .SERVICE_PORTS}}'
18	
19	tasks:
20	  help:
21	    desc: Show core command help
22	    silent: false
23	    cmds:
24	      - |
25	        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)10\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+' | head -1)}"
26	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
27	          URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
28	        else
29	          URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
30	        fi
31	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
32	        printf "\033[1mapp:\033[0m    %s\n" "{{.APP_NAME}}"
33	        printf "\033[1mmode:\033[0m   %s\n" "$( [ "{{.USE_DOCKER}}" = "1" ] && echo docker || echo local )"
34	        printf "\033[1murl:\033[0m    %s\n" "$URL"
35	        printf "\n\033[1;33mCore commands:\033[0m\n"
36	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m      bootstrap dependencies\n"
37	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m      start all services\n"
38	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m       stop all services\n"
39	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m    restart all services\n"
40	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m       follow logs\n"
41	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m     service status\n"
42	        printf "  \033[32mtask service:install\033[0m  install user systemd service\n"
43	        printf "  \033[32mtask service:enable\033[0m   enable + start user systemd service\n"

1	version: '3'

3	# ==============================================================================
4	# CodeQL Advisor - Modern Task Runner
5	# ==============================================================================
6	# Project: codeql-advisor
7	# Owner: brechtparmentier

12	# Quick Start:

content.text: Now let me sample a few more: AI tools, ai_centralAImonitoring, the linuxoptiplexvpn version of bingelKuCuDoelenRapportering2026 (no project.yml), the gitWorkFlowSolo2026, tools_claspTools2026, and the older single-file Python repos. Then a duplicate vs different check.

1	version: '3'
2	
3	silent: true
4	
5	env:
6	  RUN_DIR: .run
7	  AGENT_LOG: .run/repo-agent.log
8	  DASH_LOG: .run/repo-ai-dashboard.log
9	  AGENT_PORT: '4100'
10	  DASH_PORT: '3000'
11	
12	tasks:
13	  default:
14	    desc: Show available tasks
15	    cmds:
16	      - task --list
17	
18	  help:
19	    desc: Show available tasks
20	    cmds:
21	      - task --list
22	
23	  install:
24	    desc: Install workspace dependencies
25	    cmds:
26	      - |
27	        printf '\033[1;36m==> Installing dependencies\033[0m\n'
28	        pnpm install
29	        printf '\033[1;32m✓ Dependencies installed\033[0m\n'
30	
31	  doctor:
32	    desc: Diagnose local environment, ports, and service health
33	    cmds:
34	      - |
35	        printf '\n\033[1;37m╔══════════════════════════════════════════════╗\033[0m\n'
36	        printf '\033[1;37m║               Repo AI Doctor                ║\033[0m\n'
37	        printf '\033[1;37m╚══════════════════════════════════════════════╝\033[0m\n\n'
38	
39	        check_bin() {
40	          if command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
41	            printf '\033[1;32m✓\033[0m %-10s %s\n' "$1" "$($1 --version 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || echo 'installed')"
42	          else
43	            printf '\033[1;31m✗\033[0m %-10s not found\n' "$1"
44	          fi
45	        }
46	
47	        printf '\033[1;36mTooling\033[0m\n'
48	        check_bin node
49	        check_bin pnpm
50	        check_bin task
51	        check_bin ssh
52	        check_bin curl
53	        check_bin lsof
54	
55	        printf '\n\033[1;36mPorts\033[0m\n'
56	        AGENT_PORT_PID="$(lsof -t -nP -iTCP:${AGENT_PORT} -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true)"
57	        DASH_PORT_PID="$(lsof -t -nP -iTCP:${DASH_PORT} -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true)"
58	        if [ -n "$AGENT_PORT_PID" ]; then
59	          printf '\033[1;33m•\033[0m :%s in use by pid=%s\n' "$AGENT_PORT" "$AGENT_PORT_PID"
60	        else
61	          printf '\033[1;32m•\033[0m :%s is free\n' "$AGENT_PORT"
62	        fi
63	        if [ -n "$DASH_PORT_PID" ]; then
64	          printf '\033[1;33m•\033[0m :%s in use by pid=%s\n' "$DASH_PORT" "$DASH_PORT_PID"
65	        else
66	          printf '\033[1;32m•\033[0m :%s is free\n' "$DASH_PORT"
67	        fi
68	
69	        printf '\n\033[1;36mHealth\033[0m\n'
70	        if curl -fsS "http://localhost:${AGENT_PORT}/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
71	          printf '\033[1;32m✓\033[0m repo-agent responding on :%s\n' "$AGENT_PORT"
72	        else
73	          printf '\033[1;31m✗\033[0m repo-agent not responding on :%s\n' "$AGENT_PORT"
74	        fi
75	        if curl -fsS "http://localhost:${DASH_PORT}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
76	          printf '\033[1;32m✓\033[0m repo-ai-dashboard responding on :%s\n' "$DASH_PORT"
77	        else
78	          printf '\033[1;31m✗\033[0m repo-ai-dashboard not responding on :%s\n' "$DASH_PORT"
79	        fi
80	
81	        printf '\n\033[1;36mRuntime Files\033[0m\n'
82	        mkdir -p "$RUN_DIR"
83	        touch "$AGENT_LOG" "$DASH_LOG"
84	        printf '\033[1;32m✓\033[0m log files ready (%s, %s)\n\n' "$AGENT_LOG" "$DASH_LOG"
85	
86	  _build-runtime:
87	    internal: true
88	    cmds:
89	      - |
90	        printf '\033[1;36m==> Building runtime artifacts\033[0m\n'
91	        pnpm --filter repo-agent build
92	        pnpm --filter repo-ai-dashboard build
93	        printf '\033[1;32m✓ Runtime artifacts built\033[0m\n'
94	
95	  start:
96	    desc: Start repo-agent and repo-ai-dashboard in background
97	    cmds:
98	      - task: install
99	      - task: _build-runtime
100	      - task: _start-agent
101	      - task: _start-dashboard
102	      - task: status
103	
104	  up:
105	    desc: Alias for start
106	    cmds:
107	      - task: start
108	
109	  _start-agent:
110	    internal: true
111	    cmds:
112	      - |
113	        mkdir -p "$RUN_DIR"
114	        touch "$AGENT_LOG"
115	
116	        PORT_PID="$(lsof -t -nP -iTCP:${AGENT_PORT} -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true)"
117	        if [ -n "$PORT_PID" ]; then
118	          printf '\033[1;33m↺ repo-agent already running\033[0m (pid=%s, port=%s)\n' "$PORT_PID" "$AGENT_PORT"
119	          exit 0
120	        fi

1	# taskfiles/core.yml - Standardized Core Layer
2	# Canonical start/stop/restart/logs/status commands
3	# Wraps existing server management from dev.yml
4	
5	version: '3'
6	silent: true
7	
8	vars:
9	  APP_NAME: '{{default "bingel-kucu" .APP_NAME}}'
10	  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "43153" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
11	  API_PORT: '{{default "43155" .API_PORT}}'
12	  USE_DOCKER: '{{default "0" .USE_DOCKER}}'
13	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
14	
15	tasks:
16	  help:
17	    desc: Show core command help with URLs
18	    silent: false
19	    cmds:
20	      - |
21	        VPN_IP="{{.VPN_IP}}"
22	        VPN_IFACE=""
23	        detect_vpn_ip() {
24	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
25	            VPN_IFACE="override"
26	            return
27	          fi
28	
29	          CANDIDATE_IP=$(ip -4 -o addr show dev tun0 up 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4}' | cut -d/ -f1 | head -n1)
30	          if [ -n "$CANDIDATE_IP" ]; then
31	            VPN_IP="$CANDIDATE_IP"
32	            VPN_IFACE="tun0"
33	            return
34	          fi
35	
36	          CANDIDATE_IP=$(ip -4 -o addr show dev wg0 up 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4}' | cut -d/ -f1 | head -n1)
37	          if [ -n "$CANDIDATE_IP" ]; then
38	            VPN_IP="$CANDIDATE_IP"
39	            VPN_IFACE="wg0"
40	            return
41	          fi
42	
43	          FALLBACK_LINE=$(ip -4 -o addr show up scope global 2>/dev/null | \
44	            awk '$2 != "lo" {print $2" "$4}' | \
45	            awk '$2 ~ /^10\.0\.0\.[0-9]+\// {print; exit}')
46	          if [ -n "$FALLBACK_LINE" ]; then
47	            VPN_IFACE=$(echo "$FALLBACK_LINE" | awk '{print $1}')
48	            VPN_IP=$(echo "$FALLBACK_LINE" | awk '{print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1)
49	          fi
50	        }
51	        detect_vpn_ip
52	
53	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== TASK CORE ===\033[0m\n"
54	        printf "\033[1mapp:\033[0m    %s\n" "{{.APP_NAME}}"

56	        printf "\033[1murls:\033[0m\n"
57	        printf "  Frontend:   http://localhost:%s\n" "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
58	        printf "  API:        http://localhost:%s\n" "{{.API_PORT}}"
59	        printf "  API Docs:   http://localhost:%s/docs\n" "{{.API_PORT}}"
60	        printf "  Smart Sync: http://localhost:%s/smart-sync.html\n" "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
61	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
62	          printf "  VPN (%s):   http://%s:%s\n" "$VPN_IFACE" "$VPN_IP" "{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
63	          printf "  VPN (%s):   http://%s:%s\n" "$VPN_IFACE" "$VPN_IP" "{{.API_PORT}}"
64	        fi
65	        printf "\n\033[1;33mCore Commands:\033[0m\n"
66	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m     Start app (frontend + API)\n"
67	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m      Stop app\n"
68	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m   Restart app\n"
69	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m      Show logs\n"
70	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m    Service status\n"
71	        printf "\n\033[1;33mDevelopment:\033[0m\n"
72	        printf "  \033[32mtask dev\033[0m       Alias for start\n"
73	        printf "  \033[32mtask test\033[0m      Run tests\n"
74	        printf "  \033[32mtask setup\033[0m     Project setup\n"
75	        printf "\n\033[1;33mPipeline:\033[0m\n"
76	        printf "  \033[32mtask import\033[0m    Import JSON to DB\n"
77	        printf "  \033[32mtask export\033[0m    Export DB to dashboard\n"
78	        printf "  \033[32mtask scrape\033[0m    Scrape Bingel data\n"
79	        printf "\n"
80	
81	  start:
82	    desc: Start app (frontend + API servers)
83	    silent: false
84	    cmds:
85	      - |
86	        VPN_IP="{{.VPN_IP}}"
87	        VPN_IFACE=""
88	        detect_vpn_ip() {
89	          if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
90	            VPN_IFACE="override"
91	            return
92	          fi
93	
94	          CANDIDATE_IP=$(ip -4 -o addr show dev tun0 up 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4}' | cut -d/ -f1 | head -n1)
95	          if [ -n "$CANDIDATE_IP" ]; then
96	            VPN_IP="$CANDIDATE_IP"
97	            VPN_IFACE="tun0"
98	            return
99	          fi
100

1	version: '3'
2	
3	vars:

6	  FUNCTION_AUDIT_DIR: function-audit
7	  PROFILE_SWITCHER_DIR: profile-switcher

9	
10	tasks:
11	  # Setup & Installation
12	  install:
13	    desc: Install all dependencies
14	    cmds:
15	      - python3 -m venv {{.VENV_DIR}}
16	      - '{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/pip install --upgrade pip'
17	      - '{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/pip install -r {{.WEBAPP_DIR}}/requirements.txt'
18	      - '{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/pip install -r {{.FUNCTION_AUDIT_DIR}}/requirements.txt'
19	    sources:
20	      - '{{.WEBAPP_DIR}}/requirements.txt'
21	      - '{{.FUNCTION_AUDIT_DIR}}/requirements.txt'
22	
23	  install:webapp:
24	    desc: Install webapp dependencies only
25	    cmds:
26	      - python3 -m venv {{.VENV_DIR}}
27	      - '{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/pip install -r {{.WEBAPP_DIR}}/requirements.txt'
28	
29	  install:audit:
30	    desc: Install function-audit dependencies only
31	    cmds:
32	      - python3 -m venv {{.VENV_DIR}}
33	      - '{{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/pip install -r {{.FUNCTION_AUDIT_DIR}}/requirements.txt'
34	
35	  # Webapp Management
36	  webapp:start:
37	    desc: Start webapp (development mode)
38	    deps: [install:webapp]
39	    cmds:
40	      - cmd: echo "🚀 Starting webapp on port {{.PORT_DEV}}..."
41	        silent: true
42	      - DEPLOYMENT_MODE=standard_development {{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python {{.WEBAPP_DIR}}/app.py
43	    vars:
44	      PORT_DEV:
45	        sh: python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('{{.PORTS_FILE}}'))['standard_development']['frontend'])"
46	    interactive: true
47	
48	  webapp:start:prod:
49	    desc: Start webapp (production mode)
50	    deps: [install:webapp]
51	    cmds:
52	      - cmd: echo "🚀 Starting webapp on port {{.PORT_PROD}}..."
53	        silent: true
54	      - DEPLOYMENT_MODE=standard_production {{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python {{.WEBAPP_DIR}}/app.py
55	    vars:
56	      PORT_PROD:
57	        sh: python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('{{.PORTS_FILE}}'))['standard_production']['frontend'])"
58	    interactive: true
59	
60	  webapp:start:pm2-dev:
61	    desc: Start webapp (PM2 development mode)
62	    deps: [install:webapp]
63	    cmds:
64	      - cmd: echo "🚀 Starting webapp on port {{.PORT_PM2_DEV}}..."
65	        silent: true
66	      - DEPLOYMENT_MODE=pm2_development {{.VENV_DIR}}/bin/python {{.WEBAPP_DIR}}/app.py
67	    vars:
68	      PORT_PM2_DEV:
69	        sh: python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('{{.PORTS_FILE}}'))['pm2_development']['frontend'])"
70	    interactive: true
71	
72	  webapp:status:
73	    desc: Check webapp status
74	    cmds:
75	      - cmd: |
76	          PORT=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('{{.PORTS_FILE}}'))['standard_development']['frontend'])")
77	          if lsof -i :$PORT > /dev/null 2>&1; then
78	            echo "✅ Webapp is running on port $PORT"
79	            lsof -i :$PORT | grep LISTEN
80	          else
81	            echo "❌ Webapp is not running on port $PORT"
82	          fi
83	        silent: true
84	
85	  webapp:stop:
86	    desc: Stop webapp (kills process on configured port)
87	    cmds:
88	      - cmd: |
89	          PORT=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('{{.PORTS_FILE}}'))['standard_development']['frontend'])")
90	          PID=$(lsof -t -i :$PORT 2>/dev/null || true)
91	          if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
92	            echo "🛑 Stopping webapp (PID: $PID) on port $PORT..."
93	            kill -15 $PID
94	            sleep 2
95	            if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
96	              echo "⚠️  Process still running, force killing..."
97	              kill -9 $PID
98	            fi
99	            echo "✅ Webapp stopped"
100	          else
101	            echo "ℹ️  Webapp is not running on port $PORT"
102	          fi
103	        silent: true
104	
105	  webapp:restart:
106	    desc: Restart webapp
107	    cmds:
108	      - task: webapp:stop
109	      - sleep 1
110	      - task: webapp:start
111	
112	  # Function Audit CLI
113	  audit:collect:
114	    desc: Collect functions from a project directory
115	    cmds:
116	      - cmd: |
117	          if [ -z "{{.CLI_ARGS}}" ]; then
118	            echo "❌ Usage: task audit:collect -- /path/to/project"
119	            exit 1
120	          fi

1	# taskfiles/core.yml — leerlokaal core layer
2	# ⛔ GEEN output: prefixed   ⛔ GEEN silent: false op taken
3	version: '3'
4	silent: true
5	
6	vars:
7	  APP_NAME: '{{default "leerlokaal" .APP_NAME}}'
8	  FRONTEND_PORT: '{{default "35567" .FRONTEND_PORT}}'
9	  BACKEND_PORT: '{{default "35568" .BACKEND_PORT}}'
10	  PYTHON: '{{default "python3" .PYTHON}}'
11	  VPN_IP: '{{default "" .VPN_IP}}'
12	
13	tasks:
14	  help:
15	    desc: Show core command help
16	    silent: false
17	    cmds:
18	      - |
19	        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
20	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
21	          FE_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
22	          API_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
23	        else
24	          FE_URL="http://localhost:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
25	          API_URL="http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
26	        fi
27	        printf "\n\033[1;36m=== {{.APP_NAME}} ===\033[0m\n"
28	        printf "\033[1mapp:\033[0m       %s\n" "{{.APP_NAME}}"
29	        printf "\033[1mmode:\033[0m      local (React + FastAPI)\n"
30	        printf "\033[1mfrontend:\033[0m  %s\n" "$FE_URL"
31	        printf "\033[1mapi:\033[0m       %s\n" "$API_URL"
32	        printf "\033[1mapi docs:\033[0m  %s/docs\n" "$API_URL"

34	        printf "  \033[32mtask start\033[0m      start full stack (frontend + API)\n"
35	        printf "  \033[32mtask stop\033[0m       stop full stack\n"
36	        printf "  \033[32mtask restart\033[0m    restart full stack\n"
37	        printf "  \033[32mtask logs\033[0m       tail all logs\n"
38	        printf "  \033[32mtask status\033[0m     service status\n"
39	        if [ -f "taskfiles/project.yml" ]; then
40	          printf "\n\033[1;33mProject commands:\033[0m\n"
41	          printf "  \033[32mtask project:install\033[0m    install dependencies\n"
42	          printf "  \033[32mtask project:test\033[0m       run tests\n"
43	          printf "  \033[32mtask project:lint\033[0m       lint Python sources\n"
44	          printf "  \033[32mtask project:db-stats\033[0m   database statistics\n"
45	          printf "  \033[32mtask project:db-backup\033[0m  backup database\n"
46	          printf "  \033[32mtask project:db-import\033[0m  import curriculum data\n"

51	  start:

53	    silent: false

56	      - task: _start_api
57	      - task: _start_frontend
58	      - |
59	        VPN_IP="${VPN_IP:-$(ip -4 addr show tun0 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '(?<=inet\s)\d+(\.\d+){3}' || echo "")}"
60	        if [ -n "$VPN_IP" ]; then
61	          FE_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.FRONTEND_PORT}}"
62	          API_URL="http://${VPN_IP}:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"
63	        else

65	          API_URL="http://localhost:{{.BACKEND_PORT}}"

1	version: '3'
2	
3	vars:
4	  REPO_NAME: ikvoelmezoApp
5	  PROJECT_NAME: "Ik Voel Me Zo"
6	  ROOT_DIR: '{{.PWD}}'
7	
8	  PYTHON: '{{if eq OS "windows"}}python{{else}}python3{{end}}'
9	
10	  BACKEND_DIR: backend
11	  FRONTEND_DIR: frontend
12	  DATA_DIR: data
13	  LOGS_DIR: logs
14	  DOCS_DIR: docs
15	  BACKUP_DIR: backups
16	
17	  DB_FILE: '{{.BACKEND_DIR}}/health_tracker.db'
18	
19	  PORT: 8080
20	  PID_FILE: '{{.LOGS_DIR}}/server.pid'
21	  LOG_FILE: '{{.LOGS_DIR}}/server.log'
22	  LOCK_FILE: '{{.LOGS_DIR}}/server.lock'
23	
24	  LOCAL_IP:
25	    sh: |
26	      ip_addr=""
27	      if command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
28	        ip_addr="$(ip route get 1 2>/dev/null | awk '{for (i=1; i<=NF; i++) if ($i=="src") {print $(i+1); exit}')"
29	      elif command -v route >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v ifconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then
30	        iface="$(route -n get default 2>/dev/null | awk '/interface:/{print $2; exit}')"
31	        if [ -n "$iface" ]; then
32	          ip_addr="$(ifconfig "$iface" 2>/dev/null | awk '/inet /{print $2; exit}')"
33	        fi
34	      elif command -v hostname >/dev/null 2>&1; then
35	        ip_addr="$(hostname -I 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')"
36	      fi
37	      [ -n "$ip_addr" ] && echo "$ip_addr" || echo "127.0.0.1"
38	
39	  VPN_IP:
40	    sh: |
41	      vpn_addr=""
42	      if command -v ip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
43	        vpn_addr="$(ip -o -4 addr show 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 ~ /^(tun|tap|wg|ppp)/ {gsub(/\/.*/, "", $4); print $4; exit}')"
44	      elif command -v ifconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then
45	        for i in $(ifconfig -l 2>/dev/null | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -E '^(utun|tun|tap|wg|ppp)'); do
46	          ip="$(ifconfig "$i" 2>/dev/null | awk '/inet /{print $2; exit}')"
47	          if [ -n "$ip" ] && [ "$ip" != "127.0.0.1" ]; then
48	            vpn_addr="$ip"
49	            exit 0
50	          fi
51	        done
52	      fi
53	      echo "$vpn_addr"
